You will help manage both business and personal tasks. This is not a simple task role. I need someone who can think, organize, and take ownership.



What you’ll be doing:



• Managing
 and drafting replies

• Organizing documents, deals, and ongoing projects

• Researching real estate, legal, and business topics

• Coordinating with lawyers, accountants, and partners

• Bookkeeping support and tracking expenses

• Managing calendar and scheduling

• Helping with personal tasks like travel, reminders, and online coordination

• Assisting with dating apps… filtering profiles, drafting responses, and managing conversations (yes, this is part of the job)



What I care about:



• Strong written English… clear, natural, not robotic

• High attention to detail

• Organized and structured thinker

• Able to follow instructions AND improve systems

• Comfortable handling both business and personal tasks

• Discreet and trustworthy

• Tech comfortable (Google Docs, spreadsheets, ChatGPT, etc.)



This is NOT for you if:



• You need constant supervision

• You miss details or rush work

• You give generic copy/paste answers

• You are managing multiple full-time clients



This IS for you if:



• You like being the person who keeps everything together

• You enjoy organizing chaos

• You want to grow with one client long-term



Hours:



• Full-time preferred (flexible depending on candidate)

• Some overlap with North America time zones is helpful



Pay:



• Based on experience and performance

• Opportunity to increase over time



IMPORTANT – APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply, follow these steps exactly:



Start your message with the word: ORANGE

title: Backend Operations Manager – Ecommerce Dropshipping
description:
About the role

We operate multiple Shopify dropshipping stores across fashion and home decor, selling internationally with fulfillment from overseas suppliers. The backend of this business spans customer service, supply chain, and dispute/chargeback management, and we need someone who can pull data across all three, make sense of it, and tell us what needs to change.

This is not an execution role. You will monitor performance, identify problems, define and track KPIs, build training recommendations, and report directly to the business owner. You need to be analytical, systematic, and able to communicate findings clearly.

Requirements, all non-negotiable



Proven experience as a manager in ecommerce operations, customer service, or supply chain. Not as a rep or VA.

Strong data skills. You can pull, consolidate, and analyze operational data across CS, SCM, and dispute management, and turn it into actionable insights.

Experience defining and tracking KPIs across ecommerce operations. You know what good looks like and can spot when something is off.

Hands-on Shopify experience in order management, product admin, and store operations.

Familiarity with chargeback and payment dispute processes. You understand the mechanics, not just the terminology.

Excellent written English. Your reports and recommendations need to be clear, concise, and executive-ready.

Highly organized and self-directed. You manage your own workload, set your own priorities, and flag issues without being asked.

Reliable internet connection and a proper home office setup.



What you'll own



Consolidate and monitor data across customer service, supply chain, and dispute/chargeback functions into a single operational view.

Define, maintain, and report on KPIs for each function including resolution times, fulfillment rates, chargeback ratios, and CSAT.

Identify patterns and root causes behind performance issues. Not just reporting numbers, but explaining what's driving them.

Build training recommendations for the team based on data. What needs to improve, how, and for whom.

Communicate findings and recommendations directly to the business owner on a regular cadence.

Build and maintain SOPs, dashboards, and reporting frameworks that scale with the business.



How to apply

title: Senior Full Stack Developer - 10+ years of experience
description:
We're looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer who's passionate about building exceptional web applications and solving real-world problems for growing businesses. This is your chance to be part of a fast-moving team that values technical excellence, collaboration, and making an impact.



If you're highly skilled in React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js, hold an AWS certification, and are comfortable working US business hours, we'd love to meet you.



Key Responsibilities



Lead the design, development, and deployment of high-performance web applications on AWS infrastructure.

Work across the stack using React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js to build scalable, maintainable features.

Collaborate with product managers, designers, and fellow engineers to ship high-quality solutions.

Own development cycles from concept to deployment—including testing, documentation, and performance optimization.

Implement and maintain robust, well-tested APIs and backend services.

Contribute to architectural decisions and help mentor junior developers as needed.



Requirements



Minimum of 10+ years of hands-on experience as a Full Stack Developer.

Active AWS Certification required (Cloud Practitioner or any foundational-level certification at minimum). Candidates are expected to pursue Associate or Professional-level certifications after joining.

Hands-on experience with AWS services (e.g., Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EC2) in production environments.

Expertise with React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js in production environments.

Proficiency with REST APIs, modern JavaScript/TypeScript, and async programming.

Strong experience with Git and collaborative workflows (e.g., GitHub, GitLab).

Excellent debugging, optimization, and problem-solving skills.

Clear written and verbal communication.

Availability to work full-time during US business hours.



Preferred Qualifications



AWS Associate or Professional-level certification (Solutions Architect, Developer, or DevOps Engineer).

Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and infrastructure as code.

Experience with serverless architectures and performance-focused applications.



What We Offer



Competitive compensation (DOE).

Flexible, remote-friendly role aligned with US time zones.

Opportunities for continuous learning, mentorship, and career growth—including support for AWS certification advancement.

A supportive, collaborative team culture that values quality and innovation.

The chance to work on meaningful projects that drive real business value.



If you're a seasoned developer ready to take ownership and grow with a team that values your expertise—apply now and let's build something great together.

title: B2B Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Experienced Only)
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



IMPORTANT:  If you do not specifically have B2B cold calling experience, please do not continue.



Hi — my name is Jordan, and I’m the founder of a company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist. We help service businesses capture missed calls and turn them into real customers instead of losing them to competitors.



We are not a large corporate call center where employees are treated like numbers. We are looking for 1–2 experienced B2B cold callers who want a long-term role with the opportunity to make good money and grow with our business.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

• Source B2B leads (small business owners)

• Make outbound cold calls

• Introduce our service in a clear and simple way

• Book qualified prospects for a free consultation

• Confirm that the appointments you book actually show up

• You do not close the deals, our team handles the sales calls. Your job is to start conversations and book quality appointments.



THIS ROLE IS A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

• Have real B2B cold calling experience

• Speak clear, confident English

• Have reliable internet and a quiet workspace

• Are comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

• Are consistent, disciplined, and reliable



EXPERIENCE:

• You must have specific B2B cold calling experience

• If your experience is mostly inbound calls, customer service, appointment setting from marketing leads, please do not apply



COMPENSATION:

• $5 per hour base pay

• $25 for every attended appointment (show-up)

• $100 for every deal that closes

• Monthly performance bonuses available



HOURS:

• Part-time (20 hours per week) to start with the option to transition to full time

• Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:

• Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.  

• Do not include anything that is not related specifically to cold B2B outreach.  

• Include the following 3 things in your application:

     1) Your specific B2B cold calling experience (include what product/service you were offering and to who, please be specific)

     2) Why this role is a good fit for you.

     3) Put "Dial And Smile" in the subject line.

title: Content Marketing Assistant
description:
Overview



Searchbug is looking for a Content Marketing Assistant to support our content and digital marketing efforts. This role focuses on researching, organizing, and preparing content that helps businesses understand data verification, lead generation, and compliance tools.



The assistant will help curate topics, gather supporting information, and organize content ideas for blogs, newsletters, social media, and other marketing channels.



Key Responsibilities

Content Research and Curation

Research industry news, trends, and case studies related to telemarketing compliance, lead generation, identity verification, and data enrichment.

Collect useful insights from trusted sources such as regulatory updates, court cases, and industry publications.

Curate content ideas that can be turned into blogs, newsletters, social media posts, and videos.



Content Preparation

Draft outlines for blogs, newsletters, and educational articles.

Assist in gathering supporting information such as statistics, examples, and references.

Help compile research notes for long-form blog posts.



Content Repurposing

Identify opportunities to turn existing blogs into social media posts, short videos, or newsletters.

Extract key points from longer content for quick posts and captions.



Basic SEO Support

title: Paralegal
description:
We are a law firm in California with an active and engaged Philippine team seeking a driven and detail-oriented Litigation Paralegal to join our practice. 



We handle complex civil litigation matters, including real estate and bankruptcy disputes, contract claims, collections enforcement, and motion practice in California state and federal courts. Our work regularly involves drafting complaints, answers, oppositions, demurrers, discovery motions, etc.



We believe in technology. Understanding how to manage, adopt, train, and utilize new technologies is an essential requirement for everyone in our organization.

 

What’s the work?

• Draft pleadings, which include complaints, answers, demurrers, ex parte applications to shorten time, discovery motions, meet and confer letters, oppositions, etc. 

• Research in Westlaw  

• Respond to
s (clients and attorneys) within 30 minutes

• Gathering documents for subpoena response

• Correspond with clients, gathering info and schedule meetings with our litigation attorneys

• Attend recurring meetings such as litigation meetings, process meetings, paralegal training etc.

• Follow up on pending tasks

• Assist with legal work, including:

     ? Preparation and formatting of legal documents

     ? E-filing through Court Filing System / Attorney Services

     ? Coordinating process service

     ? Supporting attorneys with case management tasks

     ? Calendaring attorney’s deadlines, hearings, and meetings



This is not a passive administrative role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership of tasks from start to finish.



What skills and experience do we want and need?

• Prior experience in litigation required (PH litigation experience accepted)

• Experience in bankruptcy (not a requirement, but a plus)

• Skill to draft pleadings for attorneys which include complaints, answers, demurrers, ex parte applications to shorten time, discovery motions, meet and confer letters, oppositions, etc.  (not “templates” or forms, but actual content)

• Ability to manage workload and work well under pressure

• Strong organizational skills with the ability to track multiple deadlines

• Ability to take responsibility for assignments through completion

• Proficiency in Excel, Word, Outlook, Zoho; knowledge of legal billing system (ProLaw), is a plus

• Law degree or license is required

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Reliable, high-speed internet connection

• Prior US remote experience required (i.e. night owl)



Qualities: 

• Reliable

• Accountable/honest

• Punctual 

• Proactive (you anticipate issues before they become problems)



Working hours:



• Monday – Friday: 40 hours per week

• Change of schedule is subject to negotiation.



IT Requirements:

• Must complete a speed test, meet system specification requirements, and meet laptop specification requirements. Additional
 with more instructions will be sent as part of the application process.

title: Operations Quality Assurance Specialist
description:
Join a growing New York logistics company that operates with a global team to deliver time-critical services for hospitals, laboratories, law firms, and corporate clients.



About RDS Same Day Delivery

RDS Same Day Delivery is a New York–based last-mile logistics company specializing in time-sensitive deliveries for hospitals, laboratories, law firms, and corporate clients. Our operations require precision, speed, and accountability every day.



We operate with a hybrid workforce that includes both local New York teams and talented offshore professionals. Our global talent model allows us to provide extended operational coverage, strong communication support, and high service reliability for our clients.



Our operation runs 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, allowing us to support critical deliveries and provide continuous service for our clients.



About the Role

At RDS Same Day Delivery, every delivery represents our commitment to execution, professionalism, and accountability. Our clients depend on us to move time-sensitive items with precision and reliability.



We are seeking an Operations Quality Assurance Specialist who will actively monitor deliveries in progress, support drivers in real time, and ensure that every job is executed according to our operational standards. This role acts as an operational control point, identifying issues early, supporting the field team, and protecting the client experience from pickup through delivery.



Core Mission of the Role

·         Drivers are executing routes properly



·         Pickups and deliveries are happening on schedule



·         Potential service delays are identified early



·         Corrective action is taken before the client feels the impact



·         Operational standards are being followed



This role protects service reliability, client trust, and the RDS brand.



What This Role Monitors

·         Driver movement and route progress



·         Pickups that may be running behind schedule



·         Deliveries approaching service deadlines



·         Drivers who may need operational support



·         Jobs that may require route adjustments or dispatch coordination



The goal is to identify potential issues early and resolve them before service is impacted.



Daily Workflow Example

·         Review active routes and deliveries at the start of the shift



·         Monitor drivers and route progress throughout the shift



·         Identify potential delays or service risks



·         Communicate with drivers and dispatch when adjustments are needed



·         Provide updates internally or to clients when appropriate



·         Document service exceptions or operational issues



Communication & Coordination

This role maintains communication with both internal teams and clients to ensure deliveries are executed smoothly and service standards are maintained.



·         Dispatch



·         Drivers and couriers



·         Fleet and operations teams



·         Clients, when delivery updates or clarification are required



Key Responsibilities

1.       Live Delivery Monitoring



Monitor active deliveries to ensure routes and jobs are progressing as planned.



2.       Proactive Problem Solving



Communicate with drivers, assess situations quickly, recommend operational adjustments, and alert dispatch when intervention is needed.



3.       Driver Support



Maintain communication with drivers to confirm pickups, ensure deliveries are completed properly, and resolve issues quickly.



4.       Exception Awareness



Identify and document operational exceptions such as delays, route deviations, pickup complications, and delivery issues.



5.       Operational Insights



Identify patterns and opportunities to improve service reliability, including route inefficiencies and operational bottlenecks.



Tools & Systems Used

·         Xcelerator dispatch platform



·         Samsara GPS tracking system



·         Driver and tea
ssaging platforms



·         Operational dashboards and spreadsheets used for monitoring service performance



Remote Work Expectations

·         Quiet and professional home office environment



·         Reliable high-speed internet connection



·         A Computer capable of handling multiple applications simultaneously



·         Multiple monitors to efficiently track operations



·         Professional headset for clear communication



·         Ability to stay focused during operational shifts



·         Professional communication with drivers and internal teams



·         Comfort working in a fast-paced logistics environment



Ideal Experience

·         Experience in logistics, transportation, dispatch, or operations support



·         Experience monitoring routes or deliveries in real time



·         Courier or last-mile delivery experience preferred



·         Experience in roles requiring real-time monitoring, quick problem-solving, and coordination across multiple people or teams



Key Traits for Success

·         Organized and detail-oriented



·         Calm under pressure



·         Proactive rather than reactive



·         Strong communicator



·         Committed to operational excellence

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based mortgage company specializing in Non-QM and traditional loan solutions nationwide. As our organization continues to expand, we are seeking an experienced Senior Mortgage Underwriter with strong decision-making abilities, leadership potential, and advanced expertise in Non-QM loan products.

title: Health Insurance Customer Support Specialist
description:
NOW HIRING

Client Support Specialist

Health Insurance Agency  |  Remote  |  Full-Time VA  |  $4–$8/hr + Commission opportunities





ABOUT US

We are a growing health insurance agency dedicated to helping individuals and families across the United States find the right health coverage. Our team operates in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where every tea
mber plays a vital role in delivering exceptional service. We are expanding and looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to join our team and grow with us.

WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive hourly pay of $4–$8/hour based on experience, plus commission opportunities.

A clear path for growth — top performers will have opportunities for increased pay, expanded responsibilities, and leadership roles.

Fully remote position — work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection.

A supportive, team-oriented culture where your contributions are valued and recognized.

Hands-on training and exposure to the U.S. health insurance industry, building valuable long-term skills.



POSITION OVERVIEW

We are looking for a highly skilled Client Support Specialist to serve as the primary point of contact for our clients after the sale is made. You will be the face and voice of the agency, guiding policyholders through their health insurance benefits, resolving issues, and ensuring an exceptional client experience. This role requires outstanding English communication skills, a professional phone presence, and the ability to navigate the complex U.S. health insurance landscape with confidence.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Serve as the main point of contact for all post-sale client inquiries via phone,
, and messaging platforms.

Guide clients through their health insurance plans, including coverage details, claims processes, provider networks, and benefit explanations.

Assist clients with enrollment changes, plan modifications, qualifying life events, and annual renewal support.

Troubleshoot and resolve billing discrepancies, claims issues, and coverage questions by coordinating with carriers and internal tea
mbers.

Maintain detailed and accurate records of all client interactions in the agency CRM (GoHighLevel/GHL).

Proactively follow up with clients to ensure satisfaction, policy understanding, and retention.

Escalate complex cases to senior tea
mbers or carriers as needed while keeping clients informed throughout the process.

Stay current on health insurance regulations, ACA guidelines, carrier updates, and plan changes that may impact clients.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Impeccable spoken and written English — must sound natural, professional, and confident on live calls with U.S.-based clients.

Strong understanding of the U.S. health insurance industry, including ACA/Marketplace plans, Medicare, Medicaid, short-term health, and ancillary products.

Exceptional computer skills with the ability to quickly learn and navigate multiple software platforms simultaneously.

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in a client-facing support role, preferably in the insurance or healthcare industry.

Outstanding problem-solving skills with the ability to handle difficult client situations with professionalism and empathy.

Reliable high-speed internet connection, a quiet workspace, and professional-quality headset for calls.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Previous experience working in a U.S. health insurance agency or brokerage.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms.

Experience with carrier portals such as 
, SHOP, or direct carrier enrollment systems.

Licensed or willing to pursue health insurance licensing (state-specific).



HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume along with a brief cover message explaining why you are the right fit for this role. Please include:

• Your relevant experience  • Your availability and time zone  • Your internet speed test results





We are an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all tea
mbers.

title: Executive Assistant/Sales & Operations Coordinator (Construction Company)
description:
Executive Assistant / Sales & Operations Coordinator (Construction Company)

Full-Time | Remote | Australian Business | Long-Term Career Role



We are a premium Australian BPO hiring on behalf of our client, a high-end residential construction company, based in Australia. This Full-Time (FT) role offers the flexibility of Working-From-Home (WFH) during Australian Business hours 9am-5.30pm AEST. We’re offering a market-leading salary package including paid leave + bonuses. 



This client is seeking a long-term hire and a highly capable, autonomous professional who can become the right-hand support to the business owner.



This role combines Executive Assistance, Sales Administration, and Pre-Construction Operations support. This is Not a basic administrative role. We are looking for someone who enjoys responsibility, making decisions, improving systems, and helping the owner operate more efficiently.



***** Key Responsibilities Include *****



Executive Administration

• Manage the owner's calendar, scheduling, and appointments

• Organize daily priorities and workflow

• Act as the first point of contact for client enquiries

• Ensure a premium client experience



Sales & CRM Management

• Manage lead integrations from Jotform. 

• Execute fast follow-ups with new enquiries (“speed-to-lead”).

 sequences

Construction Operations Support

• Help coordinate client selections for construction projects (tiles, fixtures, finishes etc.)

• Present organized recommendations for the owner to approve



Systems & Process Optimization

• Maintain documentation using Google Workspace

• Improve internal workflows and systems

• Use AI tools to streamline documentation and processes



***** Software & Tools Used *****

The successful candidate should be comfortable working with:

• Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

• Google Calendar or Calendly

• Excel

• Microsoft Word

• Cooper CRM (Or similar)

• Jotform (Or similar)

***** Key Requirements To Apply Include ***** MUST HAVES 

• Previous experience working with a construction, architecture, engineering company (or similar).

• Excellent English communication skills both verbal and written.

• Highly organized individual with strong attention to detail

• Comfortable working with CRMs and digital marketing and lead generation systems

• Able to work independently and make decisions

• Strong problem-solving ability





***** IDEAL candidates have *****

• Previous experience working for an Australian construction company (or similar).

• Familiarity with Australian construction terminology

• Understanding of Council / CDC approval processes

• Basic CAD experience



***** WFH Requirements To Apply Include ***** MUST HAVES

- Hardware (Laptop/Monitor/Headset).

- Internet Options (Primary and Secondary- back-up options).

*****IMPORTANT ***** - To apply please include

• An overview of your existing WFH Set-UP.

• A short summation of your most relevant experience for this role.



Thank You!

title: Appointment Setter
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing health insurance agency dedicated to helping individuals and families across the United States find the right health coverage. Our team operates in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where every tea
mber plays a vital role in delivering exceptional service. We are expanding and looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to join our team and grow with us.

WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive hourly pay of $3–$7/hour based on experience, plus commission opportunities.

A clear path for growth — top performers will have opportunities for increased pay, expanded responsibilities, and leadership roles.

Fully remote position — work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection.

A supportive, team-oriented culture where your contributions are valued and recognized.

Hands-on training and exposure to the U.S. health insurance industry, building valuable long-term skills.

POSITION OVERVIEW

We are looking for an energetic and driven Outbound Prospector to power our lead generation and appointment-setting engine. You will manage outbound text message campaigns and phone outreach using our automated software systems, engaging potential clients and booking qualified appointments for our sales agents. This is a high-activity, results-driven role ideal for someone who thrives on volume, speed, and hitting targets.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Operate and manage outbound text messaging campaigns through GoHighLevel (GHL) and related automation tools to engage prospects at scale.

Conduct outbound phone calls to prospective clients, introducing our health insurance services and qualifying interest.

Set qualified appointments for licensed sales agents by following established scripts and qualification criteria.

Maintain organized records of all prospect interactions, appointment outcomes, and follow-up tasks in the CRM.

Collaborate with the sales team to refine messaging, scripts, and targeting strategies based on performance data.

Meet or exceed daily and weekly targets for outbound activity (calls, texts, and appointments set).

Manage and clean prospect lists, flag bad data, and ensure campaign compliance with TCPA and messaging regulations.

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Strong computer skills with the ability to manage multiple software tools, browser tabs, and workflows simultaneously.

Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls and engaging prospects in a professional and persuasive manner.

Excellent written communication skills — must be able to craft clear, concise, and engaging text messages.

Self-motivated with a strong work ethic and a results-oriented mindset.

Minimum 1 year of experience in outbound sales, telemarketing, appointment setting, or lead generation.

Reliable high-speed internet connection, a quiet workspace, and a professional-quality headset.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Previous experience in the health insurance or insurance industry.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL), including workflows, automations, and campaign management.

Experience with dialers, SMS platforms, or outreach automation tools (e.g., PhoneBurner, Mojo, RingCentral).

Understanding of TCPA compliance and text messaging best practices.

Proven track record of meeting or exceeding appointment-setting or sales quotas.

title: Remote Accounting Coordinator (Work from Home)
description:
Remote Accounting Coordinator (Work from Home)

CAD $9 to $10 per hour | 9-hour shifts | Eastern Time zone coverage

Independet Contractor



A growing North American facilities services organization is expanding its remote accounting support and is seeking dependable, detail-oriented professionals. This is a work-from-home independent contractor engagement supporting commercial and retail clients across Canada.



The role is paid weekly upon receipt of invoice. The schedule is 9-hour shifts, five (5) days per week. Occasional Saturday shifts (approximately once per month) may be required. Shifts align with Eastern Standard Time: 8:00–5:00, 9:00–6:00, or 10:00–7:00 EST.



Role Overview

This is a fast-moving, highly collaborative accounting support engagement within a structured, system-driven environment. Work is coordinated in real time via Zoom and internal platforms to ensure financial accuracy and maintain workflow efficiency.



As part of the accounting support function, you will work closely with internal teams, vendors, and clients, as well as play a key role in maintaining accurate financial records, supporting billing processes, and ensuring smooth daily operations. 



What You’ll Do

Customer Invoicing: Generate invoices, track deposits, process purchase order invoicing, support job costing, and assist with new client setup.

Accounts Receivable & Payable Support: Post daily cash receipts, support accounts payable data entry, assist with credit card reconciliations, and coordinate vendor payments.

Collections & Follow-Up: Monitor aging reports, follow up on outstanding receivables, issue delinquency notices, and assist in resolving invoice disputes professionally and efficiently.

Financial Reporting Support: Prepare ad-hoc management reports, create financial schedules as needed, and assist with month-end close tasks.

Documentation & Compliance: Review supporting documentation, such as work orders, approvals, and sign-offs, to ensure billing accuracy and audit readiness.

Vendor & Client Communication: Serve as a professional liaison between internal teams, vendors, and customers to resolve discrepancies and maintain positive relationships.

Process Improvement: Identify workflow inefficiencies and recommend improvements to strengthen accounting operations.



Requirements for Home Office Set-Up

• Preferred: Windows PC running Windows 11.

• Minimum 300 Mbps internet speed (600 Mbps preferred); fibre connection strongly preferred.

• Multiple monitors required (single monitor setups are not suitable).

• High-quality headset with microphone.

• Reliable webcam.

• Quiet, professional workspace suitable for full-day Zoom collaboration.



What You Bring

Accounting Experience: Previous experience in accounts receivable, accounts payable, invoicing, or bookkeeping support is required. Experience working in remote or virtual accounting environments preferred.

Technical Proficiency: Strong Microsoft Office skills, particularly Excel. Comfortable working across multiple systems, databases, and accounting platforms simultaneously.

Organization: You can handle high
 volumes, prioritize tasks, and keep everything on track.

Problem-solving: You take initiative, think independently, and easily resolve issues.

Collaborative Communicator: You work confidently with others, fostering accountability and motivation. You are a positive, self-motivated individual with clear communication.

Composed Under Pressure: You enjoy working within tight deadlines with close attention to detail in a fast-paced environment.

title: Health Insurance Data and Contracting Support
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing health insurance agency dedicated to helping individuals and families across the United States find the right health coverage. Our team operates in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where every tea
mber plays a vital role in delivering exceptional service. We are expanding and looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to join our team and grow with us.

WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive hourly pay of $3–$7/hour based on experience, plus commission opportunities.

A clear path for growth — top performers will have opportunities for increased pay, expanded responsibilities, and leadership roles.

Fully remote position — work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection.

A supportive, team-oriented culture where your contributions are valued and recognized.

Hands-on training and exposure to the U.S. health insurance industry, building valuable long-term skills.

POSITION OVERVIEW

We are seeking a detail-oriented Data & Contracting Specialist to manage the backbone operations of our agency. This role is critical to keeping our agent contracting, data fulfillment, invoicing, and administrative systems running smoothly. You will support the agency’s key players by handling essential back-office functions that directly impact growth and profitability.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage the full agent contracting lifecycle: process new agent appointments, carrier applications, certifications, and onboarding documentation.

Track and maintain contracting status for all agents across multiple carriers, ensuring timely renewals, compliance, and up-to-date records.

Execute data fulfillment processes including lead data management, list preparation, data segmentation, and delivery to marketing partners.

Manage invoicing for the team and coordinate billing with the agency’s data and marketing company partners.

Maintain and update agency databases, spreadsheets, and CRM records with accuracy and consistency.

Provide administrative support to agency leadership, including scheduling, document preparation, and task management.

Prepare reports on contracting pipeline, data delivery metrics, and financial summaries as requested.

Coordinate with carriers, marketing vendors, and internal tea
mbers to resolve data discrepancies and contracting issues.

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills — you thrive on accuracy and process management.

Strong computer proficiency including advanced skills in spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets), CRM platforms, and data management tools.

Experience with invoicing, billing, or basic bookkeeping processes.

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in an administrative, data entry, or operations support role.

Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines independently with minimal supervision.

Strong written communication skills for professional correspondence with carriers, vendors, and tea
mbers.

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free workspace.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Previous experience in health insurance agent contracting or insurance agency operations.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms.

Experience working with carrier contracting portals and appointment systems.

Background in data fulfillment, lead management, or marketing operations.

Experience with invoicing tools such as QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or similar platforms.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume along with a brief cover message explaining why you are the right fit for this role. Please include:

• Your relevant experience  • Your availability and time zone  • Your internet speed test results

title: Client Success & Social Media Coordinator
description:
ABOUT FORGE STUDIO



Forge Studio is a Melbourne-based creative agency specialising in CGI, film, photography, and digital content for property developers and luxury brands. We deliver end-to-end visual campaigns — from 3D architectural renders and cinematic video through to social media management and brand strategy. 



Our clients include leading property groups across Melbourne and Bali, and we operate with a lean, high-output team supported by offshore production talent.



We’re looking for a switched-on, detail-oriented coordinator to sit at the centre of our client delivery and social media operations — someone who can keep multiple workstreams moving, create compelling content, and maintain the quality standard our clients expect.



ROLE OVERVIEW



This is a hands-on execution role that bridges client success, social media management, and lightweight project coordination. You’ll be the connective tissue between our creative output and our clients’ audiences, scheduling content, managing approvals, building ad campaigns, and keeping render production workflows on track.



You’ll work across multiple clients and platforms simultaneously, using Notion as your operating system, Dropbox as your asset library, and Meta Business Suite as your publishing and advertising engine.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Social Media Content Scheduling & Publishing

• Source and curate creative assets from organised Dropbox folders — including photography, CGI renders, video stills, and branded collateral — selecting the right content for each client’s posting schedule and campaign objectives.

• Write compelling, on-brand captions for every post, tailored to each client’s tone of voice, audience, and strategic goals. Captions must be engaging, grammatically polished, and optimised for platform-specific best practices (hashtags, CTAs, character limits, emoji usage).

• Build and maintain content calendars on Notion, scheduling all creative assets, captions, posting dates, and platform assignments on dedicated client dashboards. Each post should be logged with its associated image, copy, target platform, and status (draft, pending approval, approved, published).

• Submit all scheduled content for client approval via the Notion dashboard workflow before any content goes live. Track approval status, implement client feedback, and re-submit revised content as needed — ensuring nothing is published without sign-off.

• Publish approved content via Meta Business Suite, scheduling posts across
 and Instagram at optimal times. Monitor publishing confirmations and troubleshoot any scheduling or delivery issues.

• Maintain a consistent posting cadence across all active client accounts, ensuring no gaps in the content calendar and proactively flagging when new assets or approvals are needed to stay on schedule.

2. Meta Advertising (Paid Social)

• Set up and launch ad campaigns in Meta Business Suite 
 Ads Manager / Instagram Ads) using pre-approved creative assets provided by the Forge Studio production team or sourced from Dropbox.

• Configure campaigns end-to-end: select the correct campaign objective (awareness, traffic, engagement, conversions, leads), define target audiences using demographic, interest-based, and behavioural targeting, set budgets and bid strategies, and assign placements (Feed, Stories, Reels, Audience Network).

• Build ad sets and individual ads with correct creative specifications — ensuring imagery and video meet Meta’s format, resolution, and aspect ratio requirements for each placement.

• Write high-performing ad copy including primary text, headlines, and descriptions that align with the client’s brand voice and are optimised for click-through rate and conversion.

• Implement tracking and attribution: install and verify Meta Pixel events, configure custom conversions where applicable, and ensure UTM parameters are appended to all destination URLs for accurate performance measurement.

• Monitor campaign performance daily, reviewing key metrics (CPM, CPC, CTR, CPA, ROAS) and making real-time optimisations — adjusting budgets, pausing underperforming ad sets, refreshing creative, and testing new audience segments.

• Deliver regular performance reports to the Managing Director summarising spend, results, insights, and recommended next steps. Flag any issues with ad delivery, disapprovals, or account health promptly.

• Stay current with Meta platform updates, algorithm changes, and advertising best practices to ensure all campaigns are built and optimised to the highest standard.

3. Project Workflow Management (3D Renders)

• Set up and maintain project dashboards on Notion for active 3D render jobs, using the established Forge Studio workflow template. Each dashboard should track project phases, deliverable status, revision rounds, and key dates.

• Receive client briefs, reference materials, and feedback and translate them into clear, actionable production notes for the offshore 3D rendering team. Notes must be specific, unambiguous, and include annotated references where necessary.

• Relay revision notes and feedback between clients and the offshore team, ensuring nothing is lost in translation. Track all revision rounds on the Notion dashboard and confirm each round is actioned before moving to the next.

• Manage project timelines and status updates, proactively chasing deliverables, flagging delays, and keeping the Managing Director informed of progress across all active render jobs.

• Maintain organised file structures in Dropbox for each render project — including source files, reference imagery, client-approved finals, and version history.

• Coordinate with the Managing Director on scope changes, additional revision requests, or any production issues that fall outside the original brief.

4. Client Communication & Account Management

• Serve as a reliable day-to-day point of contact for assigned client accounts, responding to queries promptly and professionally.

• Keep clients informed on content schedules, campaign progress, and render delivery timelines without being prompted — proactive communication is essential.

• Manage client expectations around turnaround times, revision allowances, and deliverable scope, escalating to the Managing Director when decisions are needed.

• Document all client interactions, briefs, and decisions on the relevant Notion dashboards to maintain a single source of truth across every workstream.



TOOLS & PLATFORMS YOU’LL USE DAILY

• Notion — Content calendars, project dashboards, approval workflows, task management

• Dropbox — Creative asset storage, file sharing, and project folder structures

• Meta Business Suite — Organic post scheduling, ad campaign setup, performance reporting

•
 Ads Manager — Campaign creation, audience building, pixel management, optimisation

• Figms — Light graphic design and asset resizing (bonus)

• Slack or similar — Internal team communication



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

• Proven experience managing social media accounts for brands or agencies, including content scheduling, caption writing, and community awareness.

• Demonstrated ability to set up, manage, and optimise Meta ad campaigns 
 and Instagram) with a clear understanding of campaign objectives, audience targeting, and performance metrics.

• Strong written communication skills — you can write polished, engaging copy that adapts to different brand voices and audiences.

• Highly organised with an ability to manage multiple clients and projects simultaneously without dropping the ball.

• Comfortable working in Notion as a central project management and scheduling tool.

• Familiarity with Dropbox for file management and asset sourcing.

• Detail-oriented — you catch typos, check links, verify image specs, and double-check approvals before anything goes live.

• Self-directed and proactive — you don’t wait to be chased; you anticipate what’s needed and get ahead of it.

• A basic understanding of visual aesthetics and brand consistency — you know when an image, layout, or caption feels off-brand.



BONUS SKILLS (HIGHLY VALUED)

• Basic video editing skills — ability to trim, resize, add captions or text overlays to short-form video content (Reels, Stories) using tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar.

• Graphic design capability — resizing assets, creating simple social tiles, adapting brand templates in Canva or Adobe Illustrator/Photoshop.

• Experience with property, architecture, hospitality, or luxury brand marketing.

• Familiarity with 3D render production pipelines or CGI workflows.

• Basic understanding of SEO, Google Business Profile management, or
 marketing platforms.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THIS ROLE

• Content calendars are always populated at least two weeks ahead, with all posts drafted, captioned, and submitted for approval on time.

• Meta ad campaigns are live, optimised, and consistently meeting or exceeding client KPIs.

• 3D render dashboards are up to date, notes are relayed accurately, and the offshore team has everything they need to deliver without delays.

• Clients feel looked after — they know where things are at without having to ask.

• The Managing Director can trust that day-to-day operations are running smoothly and only needs to step in for strategic decisions.

title: Junior Accountant (Remote)
description:
We’re Hiring: Junior Accountant (Remote)

 Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time



Are you a detail-oriented accounting professional looking to grow your career in a fast-paced, global work environment? Join our team as a Junior Accountant and work closely with our Accounting Manager to support accurate financial reporting, compliance, and continuous improvement across our finance operations.



About the Role



As a Junior Accountant, you will play a key role in maintaining financial accuracy, supporting audits, and ensuring timely accounting processes. This is an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys working with numbers, deadlines, and structured systems—while working 100% remotely.



Key Responsibilities



Assist in preparing financial statements in compliance with accounting standards



Perform general ledger reconciliations, journal entries, and month-end/year-end closing tasks



Manage accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely and accurate processing



Support tax preparation and compliance with local and international regulations



Monitor cash flow, budgeting, and financial forecasting



Conduct basic financial analysis to support business decisions and cost control



Assist with internal audits and ensure compliance with company policies



Collaborate with the Accounting Manager on process improvements and efficiency initiatives

What We’re Looking For

title: USA LOAN OFFICER
description:
Remote Loan Officer (U.S. Mortgage Team)

Overview

We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Loan Officer to join our dynamic U.S.-based mortgage team. In this long-term, fully remote role, you will serve as the crucial link between borrowers, real estate agents, and our internal processing teams. Your primary mission is to deliver an exceptional, seamless loan experience from the initial application all the way through to closing.



Key Responsibilities

Drive Lead Generation: Actively build and nurture referral networks with realtors, builders, and developers to generate consistent borrower leads.



Advise & Guide Clients: Educate applicants on available loan products (FHA, VA, Conventional, USDA) and accurately assess their eligibility.



Manage the Pipeline: Oversee the entire loan process, ensuring all milestones and deadlines are strictly met.



Process Applications: Accurately complete and input the 1003 loan application into the Loan Origination System.



Collect & Validate Documentation: Gather, organize, and verify essential borrower financial documents, including W-2s, tax returns, and pay stubs.



Coordinate with Third Parties: Collaborate seamlessly with title companies, appraisers, and underwriters to clear conditions and successfully move files to the closing table.



Maintain Clear Communication: Deliver timely, proactive updates to borrowers and referral partners via phone,
, and our CRM.



Qualifications & Must-Have Skills

1. Core Mortgage Knowledge



U.S. Lending Guidelines: Deep understanding of Conventional, FHA, VA, and USDA loan programs.



Regulatory Compliance: Thoroughly familiar with U.S. mortgage regulations, including TRID, RESPA, TILA, and ECOA.



Income & Ratio Analysis: Highly competent in evaluating borrower income documentation and calculating DTI and LTV.



2. Technical & Software Expertise



Loan Origination Systems (LOS): Hands-on experience with Encompass, Calyx Point, ARIVE, or LendingPad.



Automated Underwriting Systems (AUS): Proven ability to run and interpret findings from Desktop Underwriter (DU) and Loan Product Advisor (LPA).



CRM Management: Skilled in using platforms like Salesforce, Jungo, or Pipedrive for tracking leads and managing client communications.



3. Remote Work & Soft Skills



Advanced English (C1/C2): Impeccable written and verbal communication skills for direct, professional interaction with U.S. borrowers.



Schedule Alignment: Must be able to work U.S. business hours (9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST).



Reliable Remote Setup: Requires a high-performance computer, a noise-canceling headset, and a highly stable internet connection (with a reliable backup).

title: Sales Virtual Assistant / Appointment Setter
description:
We are a fast-growing home service company based in California looking to hire a reliable and motivated Virtual Assistant to help manage incoming leads, customer communication, outbound calls, and appointment scheduling.



Our industry is extremely competitive. Customers often contact multiple companies at the same time, and the company that responds first and communicates most professionally usually wins the job.



Because of this, speed, persistence, and professionalism are extremely important.



Your role will be to contact new leads, communicate with customers, follow up on previous inquiries, and schedule technician appointments.



You will also assist with basic data entry and updating customer information inside our CRM system.



You do not need previous experience with our software, as we will train you on how to use our CRM, call system, and internal tools.



This position is ideal for someone who is comfortable speaking with customers, organized, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.



**Important – Read This Job Post Carefully**



Please read this job post in its entirety before applying.



This position requires attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully.



Applications that do not follow the instructions outlined in this post will not be reviewed.



ABSOLUTE REQUIREMENTS (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet these requirements.



We will not review applications that do not meet them.



Applicants must have:



• Strong and reliable internet connection (strong WiFi)

• Backup power in case of power outages

• Excellent English speaking ability with minimal accent

• Quiet and dedicated workspace (no background noise)

• Professional quality headset for customer calls



Strongly recommended:



• Dual monitor setup (two screens) to efficiently manage calls and CRM tasks.



Voice Recording Requirement (MANDATORY)



This role requires speaking with customers on the phone throughout the day.



Because of this, all applicants must submit a voice recording reading the script below.



This recording allows us to evaluate:



• English fluency

• Accent clarity

• Professional tone

• Communication ability



Any application submitted without a voice recording will NOT be reviewed or considered.



Please record yourself reading the script below clearly and naturally, as if you are leaving a voi
 for a real customer.



Record in a quiet environment using your headset.



Voice Recording Script



Please read the following message exactly as written:



Hello, this is (insert your name) calling with Professional Garage Door Services.



Our phone number is
, that’s
.



The reason I’m calling is because you recently submitted an inquiry regarding garage door assistance, and we would like to learn a little more about the issue you are experiencing and how we can help.



Our company specializes in garage door repairs, maintenance, and new garage door installations, and our technicians are equipped to handle most issues the same day.



At the 
nt, we actually have a technician working in your area, and because of that we may be able to provide same-day service depending on availability.



What we normally do is send one of our technicians out to perform a quick inspection of the garage door system, identify the issue, and provide you with a free, no-obligation estimate before any work is done.



During the inspection, the technician may also check torsion springs, track alignment, reinforcement struts, roller assemblies, cable tension, opener limits, and the safety sensor system to determine the exact cause of the problem.



The inspection typically only takes a few minutes and it allows our technician to explain exactly what is going on with the door and what options are available for repair or replacement.



If you would like to schedule a visit from one of our technicians, please give us a call at
, and we will be happy to get that arranged for you.



Once again, that phone number is
.



Thank you very much for your time, and we look forward to assisting you. Have a great day.



Scope of Work



Your responsibilities will include:



• Data entry and updating customer information in our CRM

• Placing outbound calls to new leads

• Following up with previous customers

• Scheduling technician appointments

• Sending text messages and
s to customers

• Updating lead notes and tracking communication history

• Coordinating with our internal team



You will be trained on how to use our CRM, dialing systems, and internal tools.



Work Schedule



This position requires working during U.S. daytime hours, which is night shift in the Philippines.



Shifts are 9 hours in length and will fall between the hours of:



7:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST



Exact shifts will be assigned during the hiring process.



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



• Is comfortable speaking with customers on the phone

• Has strong communication skills

• Is organized and detail-oriented

• Can follow instructions carefully

• Works well in a fast-paced environment

• Is reliable and punctual



Compensation



Starting pay is $5.00 USD per hour.



There is opportunity for pay increases based on performance and demonstrated ability to succeed in this role.



Tea
mbers who show strong communication skills, reliability, and the ability to consistently perform in this fast-paced environment will be considered for raises over time.



This position is intended to be a long-term role for the right candidate.



Application Instruction



To confirm that you carefully read the entire job description, please start your application with the word:



Technician



Applications that do not include this word at the beginning will not be reviewed.

title: Shopify Store Builder VA (Ecommerce Product Testing)

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING



Hi — my name is Jordan, and I’m the founder of a company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.  We help service businesses capture missed calls and turn them into real customers instead of losing them to competitors.



We are not a large corporate call center where employees are treated like numbers.  We are looking for 1–2 experienced B2B cold callers who want a long-term role with the opportunity to make good money and grow with our business.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

• Source B2B leads (small business owners)

• Make outbound cold calls

• Introduce our service in a clear and simple way

• Book qualified prospects for a free consultation

• Help confirm that the appointments you book actually show up

• You do not close the deals. Our team handles the sales calls. Your job is to start conversations and book quality appointments.



THIS ROLE IS A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

• Have real B2B cold calling experience

• Speak clear, confident English

• Have reliable internet and a quiet workspace

• Are comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

• Are consistent, disciplined, and reliable



EXPERIENCE:

• You must have specific B2B cold calling experience

• If your experience is mostly inbound calls, customer service, appointment setting from marketing leads, please do not apply



COMPENSATION:

• $5 per hour base pay

• $25 for every attended appointment (show-up)

• $100 for every deal that closes

• Monthly performance bonuses available



HOURS:

• Part-time (20 hours per week)

• Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:

• Please do not send a generic message - those will be ignored.

• Include the following 3 things in your application:

    1) Your specific B2B cold calling experience

    2) Why this role is a good fit for you

    3) Put "Dial And Smile" in the subject line

title: Construction project coordinator
description:
I'll cut straight to it, we are looking to hire two new tea
mbers for long-term, 10 years plus. We are looking for like-minded tea
mbers, the right person for the right seat, while we are in the process of getting to greatness. You have to be self-driven with very high goals and willing to give it 110%, like the rest of our team. For the right person, this will be easy and work with our team; for the wrong person, you will hate it.



Do us both a favor and don't waste our time if you dont have the above, or share our core values and culture of standards.



Department: Project Management

Reports To: Project Manager (Senior PM / GM CC’d as required)

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time, Non-Exempt



Who is Team RRE?

We are team players who prioritize open communication while exercising emotional control. We do the right thing and are dedicated to winning. We are not perfect—we learn from our mistakes in the process of being great.



Team RRE Core Values

We Are Team Players

We Prioritize Open Communication

We Exercise Emotional Control

We Do the Right Thing

We Are Dedicated to Winning



Vision

To be the greatest nationwide, relationship-based electrical contractor with the best culture for our tea
mbers.



Purpose

To serve our clients with the highest level of communication and provide maximum value in order to build long-term, relationship-based partnerships.



What’s In It for You

Strong, winning Team culture

Permanent, full-time position

Growth opportunities as we expand locally and nationwide

Access to company health plan (Kaiser Permanente)

Dental and vision coverage

Retirement plan

Six paid holidays per year



Position Overview

The Project Coordinator is a critical support role responsible for relieving Project Managers of coordination, documentation, tracking, and field-support responsibilities so projects are executed efficiently, profitably, and professionally.

This role serves as a central communication hub between Project Managers, field tea
mbers, vendors, clients, and general contractors. Extreme organization, proactive communication, emotional control, and a strong desire to help Team RRE win are required.



Key Responsibilities & Tasks

Project Setup

Prepare job folders upon contract award and ensure all documents are properly organized in Google Drive.

Coordinate and distribute startup documentation, including:

Certificates of Insurance (including additional insured)

Business licenses

Joint Check Agreements

Team Introduction Letters

Communicate with material vendors (e.g., Platt) to establish job accounts.

Assist Project Managers with job costing worksheets and ensure Accounting loads projects into QuickBooks.

Prepare Statements of Values and load them into Google Sheets and Contractor Foreman.

Address and track all required submittals.



Tracking & Documentation

Track schedules and coordinate all active work.

Track daily site reports and store them in the appropriate folders.

Track site photos and organize albums by job phase and date.

Receive incoming job-related
s and route critical requests to the Project Manager per direction.

Update each job’s status line weekly.

Generate a Weekly Job Team Talk (WJTT) Google Doc for every active job, serving as the official weekly update.



Weekly Job Team Talks (WJTT)

Prepare, distribute, and track WJTTs for every job, every week.

Ensure WJTTs clearly communicate:

Job progress

Schedule status

Labor hours and production

Material status and deliveries

Risks, constraints, and next steps

Coordinate WJTTs with jobsite Leads and GC on-site supervisors as required.

Store all WJTT documentation in Google Drive per Team RRE standards.



Contractor Foreman Tasks

Load jobs into Contractor Foreman, including plans, documents, and communications.

Ensure Daily Logs are completed and tracked.

Load new field tea
mbers, assign roles, and verify system access.

Support onboarding by ensuring field tea
mbers can access the app and locate assigned jobs.

Keep Contractor Foreman clean and current as jobs close out.

Ensure end-of-month job inspections and percentage-of-completion updates are completed and posted.





Field Support, Materials & Equipment

Order and coordinate materials and equipment per approved job budgets.

Track material deliveries and equipment usage to support field productivity.

Monitor equipment rentals and usage to minimize unnecessary costs.

Assist Purchasing with large material orders, equipment vendors, pricing, approvals, and follow-ups.

Coordinate lodging and per diem requirements for field tea
mbers.

Assist with weekly mileage tracking and verification for payroll.

Receive and reconcile tooling lists; track missing tools, ladders, and equipment.



Change Orders & Financial Support

Prepare change orders for:

Time & Material work

Scope changes or additions

Overtime work

Equipment-driven requirements

Assist with retainage tracking, invoicing, collections, and Schedule of Values.

Prepare monthly progress billings (manager approval required).

Receive, review, and process payment applications.

Log and track all change orders from initiation through invoicing.



Training & Development

Demonstrates self-awareness of strengths and development needs.

Owns and actively manages a career path toward maximum potential.

Self-motivated, lifelong learner committed to continuous improvement.

Continuously upgrades job knowledge and emotional control.

Asks questions, communicates clearly, takes ownershipand dedicated to winning.



Knowledge, Skills & Abilities

Strong organizational and multitasking skills with attention to detail.

Proficient in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail) and Contractor Foreman.

Great written and verbal communication skills.

Take massive action to get things done.

Professional, tactful, and service-oriented client interaction.

Ability to build and maintain strong professional relationships with clients.

Emotional Control: Ability to manage personal emotions and positively influence others.



Education & Experience

Construction or electrical industry experience preferred; formal education not required.



Core Competencies

Very high productivity

Understands massive action

Strong ownership mentality

Great financial accountability

Calm under pressure

Organized and detail-oriented

Clear communicator

Team-first, solutions-driven mindset



Why Join Team RRE

Strong culture built on values, not ego

Growing company with a long-term vision

Leadership that cares about people—not just numbers

Opportunity to grow into senior leadership as the company scales

title: Litigation Paralegal (U.S. Employment Law Firm) – Remote – $6/hr
description:
Pay: $6/hour

Schedule: Full-time preferred, but strong part-time candidates will be considered.



About the Firm



We are a U.S.-based employment law firm representing employees in workplace disputes. Our cases involve federal and state litigation, administrative filings, and pre-suit advocacy such as demand letters.



We are looking for a detail-oriented litigation paralegal based in the Philippines who has experience working with U.S. law firms and understands basic litigation processes.



Core Responsibilities



Your primary responsibilities will include:



• Preparing and filing documents in U.S. federal courts (CM/ECF experience preferred)

• Formatting legal documents, including demand letters, pleadings, and motions

• Assisting with drafting and organizing discovery requests and discovery responses

• Formatting exhibits and attachments for filings

• Ensuring documents comply with court formatting rules

• Managing and organizing case files and litigation documents

• Assisting attorneys with litigation preparation and document review



Required Qualifications



• Prior experience working with a U.S. law firm

• Experience with federal court filings (CM/ECF) strongly preferred

• Familiarity with litigation documents (complaints, motions, discovery, etc.)

• Strong attention to detail and formatting accuracy

• Excellent written English

• Ability to follow detailed instructions and meet deadlines

• Reliable internet and ability to work during U.S. business hours (at least partially)



Nice to Have



• Experience with employment law cases

• Familiarity with discovery processes

• Experience using legal case management systems



How to Apply:



Please use this link to apply for the job:

title: Shopify Website Builder / UX Improvement
description:
We are looking for someone experienced with Shopify and e-commerce website building to help improve and build out our Shopify store.



Our store focuses on toys, collectibles, and trading cards and currently manages 20,000+ SKUs. Because of this, we need someone who understands how to structure and organize a website so customers can easily browse a large catalog.



The role will focus on improving the overall customer experience, navigation, and how products are presented across the site.



Bonus Experience

• Experience working with large Shopify catalogs (10k+ SKUs)

• Experience customizing Shopify themes / Liquid

• Experience improving navigation, collections, and filtering systems

• Familiarity with toy, collectible, or trading card stores



Our Goal

We want to build a store that makes it easy for customers to:



• Browse thousands of products without feeling overwhelmed

• Find products by series, brand, or category quickly

• Discover new products across different toy and trading card lines



The goal is to create a clean, scalable store structure that works well with a large catalog.



Ideal Candidate

• Has experience building Shopify stores or large e-commerce websites

• Understands how to structure large product catalogs

• Focuses on customer browsing experience and usability

• Can implement improvements efficiently once direction is given



Application Instructions

Please do not include a resume.



Instead, include links to Shopify stores or full pages you have built or worked on so we can review your work.



Once a direction is approved, we do expect fast implementation of the improvements discussed.

title: YouTube Video Editor
description:
Hi! We run a growing faceless YouTube channel about pets (dogs, cats, puppies, kittens, and more) and we’re looking for a reliable video editor who can help us create consistent 9–13 minute videos.

This is a long-term role for the right person. Our biggest challenge has been finding someone who can read and follow instructions. 



We’re looking for someone who can take a topic and turn it into a finished informational video using our format and structure.

This includes:

• Researching the topic using provided direction and keywords

• Writing an engaging script with a strong hook

• Generating a natural-sounding AI voiceover

• Sourcing and editing clips to match pacing and sentiment

• Delivering a clean, cohesive final video

We provide:

• Topic direction and keyword guidance

• Clear formatting examples

• Hook guidance and structure expectations

• Ongoing coaching and refinement

You won’t be starting from scratch — we have a defined style and format. We’re looking for someone who enjoys building content from idea to final output and takes ownership of what they create.

We like our content informative but not dry. A little personality goes a long way.

________________________________________

WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

• Deliver final videos in 1080p

• Strong editing skills (cutting, pacing, audio syncing, basic enhancement, transitions, muting/adjusting audio, zoom/pan, etc.)

• Ability to responsibly find and source clips

• Daily communication (quick update + questions + what you’ll work on next)

Most importantly - the ability to follow written directions. I realize, if you are paying attention, that it sounds like I'm being repetitive. But if you have waded through the piles of applications that we have - you would understand why I'm repeating myself. And I probably will again at least one more time before the end of this job description. LOL



Bonus:

If you already have subscriptions to stock footage sites with commercial licenses, mention them in your application.

Please follow the application instructions below. It is very disheartening to have to pass on a good editor because they can't follow written instructions. 

________________________________________

HOW TO APPLY (Important - please follow these instructions. One of the things we evaluate on is the ability to follow directions. So don't skip any of these steps. If your skills are great but you can't follow directions... well, it's a headache for both of us.)

1. To apply, include the word fireplace at the top of your message

2 Let us know your three favorite types of pets (It’s not necessary to actually have pets currently)

3 Give us a brief description of your general video editing experience and specifically your YouTube editing experience (channels/niches/etc)

4 Briefly describe a project where you took a video from idea to finished product

5  Provide us two to five relevant samples (YouTube links or a video portfolio — not everything you’ve ever done.)

6 What editing software you use

7 Your typical turnaround time for a 9–13 minute video

8 Your minimum monthly or hourly rate for full-time (40 hours/week)



The rate of pay  for this position will be in the range of $340–$550 per month (depending on experience, output and quality)



If selected to move forward in the application process, we’ll start with a paid test to see if we’re a good fit. Final hiring decisions will be based on the test.

Thanks — excited to see your work!

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (High Call Volume)
description:
We are hiring a high-energy cold caller to contact home service businesses in the United States (HVAC, plumbing, electricians, etc.).



Your job is simple:

Call businesses, ask a short question, and book a 15-minute demo appointment if they show interest.



You are not responsible for selling. Only book appointments.



Example opening:



“Hi Mike — quick question. When your technicians are out on jobs and a new customer calls your business, who usually answers the phone?”



If they show interest, schedule a demo.



Call Expectations



• Minimum 150 calls per shift

• Target 200–250 calls per shift

• Calls are quick (20–45 seconds)

• If voi
 answers, hang up and call the next lead immediately

• Do not leave voi
s



Schedule



• 4 hours per day

• 5 days per week (20 hours total)



Pay



• $4/hour base

• $0.05 per completed call

• $20 bonus for each qualified appointment that attends the meeting



All calls are recorded for quality.



To apply



Send a short voice recording introducing yourself and your cold calling experience.



Include the word CALLER at the start of your message.
