title: Video Editor
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the health & wellness niche, and we’re looking for a creative, detail-oriented Video Editor who can produce high-converting product videos, ads, and VSLs that truly resonate with our audience.



This role is ideal for an editor who understands direct-to-consumer e-commerce video styles 
 ads, TikTok creatives, branded product explainers) and can take raw concepts or scripts and turn them into scroll-stopping videos.



Responsibilities



Edit and deliver short-form ad creatives (15s, 30s, 60s) optimized for
, TikTok, and Instagram.



Create VSLs (Video Sales Letters) that highlight product benefits and drive conversions.



Source stock footage, UGC-style clips, and b-roll from high-quality platforms.



Use AI tools (where appropriate) to generate supporting visuals or voiceovers.



Research and take inspiration from top-performing e-commerce health/wellness ads.



Add captions, motion graphics, and branding to keep videos polished and on-brand.



Work closely with the marketing team to test multiple variations and optimize performance.



Requirements



Proven experience editing e-commerce ads or branded product videos.



Strong portfolio showing health/wellness, fitness, or lifestyle product ads.



Ability to source high-quality stock footage & music.



Knowledge of direct-response ad structure (problem ? solution ? product ? CTA).



Familiarity with platform specs (ratios, length, compliance for FB/TikTok/IG).



Skilled with tools like Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or AI video editors.



Creative eye, attention to detail, and ability to meet deadlines.



Nice to Have



Experience editing AI-enhanced content (voiceovers, avatars, captions).



Familiarity with the health & wellness niche.



Understanding of performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, engagement) to refine creatives.



What We Offer



Project-based pay to start, with consistent work once we restock and scale campaigns.



Competitive compensation based on experience and output.



Growth opportunities into lead editor role as our brand expands.



How to Apply



Please send us:



A short introduction (2–3 sentences about your editing style/experience).



Portfolio or links to e-commerce product ads you’ve created (health/wellness niche preferred).



Your typical turnaround time for a 30–60s ad creative.



Your rate (per video or hourly).



Answers to these screening questions:



What is your process for creating a high-converting e-commerce ad from scratch?



How do you source stock/UGC footage for products?



Which editing tools/AI platforms are you comfortable with?



Share 1 health/wellness ad you admire  what makes it effective?



If given a script for a product in the health niche, how would you structure a VSL?
salary: 7-10 usd per minute of video ad

title: Cold Caller for Virtual Real Estate Wholesaling Company (Full-Time)
description:
Position: Cold Caller / Lead Generation Specialist

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Job Type: Full-Time

Salary: $300–$350 per month + $500 bonus for every closed deal



About Us

We are a growing virtual real estate wholesaling company focused on finding off-market property deals across the United States. We help homeowners who may want to sell quickly and connect them with investors.

We’re looking for a motivated and confident cold caller who is comfortable speaking with homeowners and generating motivated seller leads.



Responsibilities:

*Make outbound cold calls to homeowners in the U.S.

*Follow a provided script to start conversations

*Identify motivated sellers interested in selling their property

*Collect key property details and motivation for selling

*Enter notes and lead information into our CRM

*Set appointments or transfer qualified leads to the acquisitions manager

*Maintain a positive and professional attitude on calls



Requirements

Previous cold calling or telemarketing experience

Good English communication skills

Confident speaking with U.S. homeowners

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Ability to work U.S. business hours

Experience with real estate, wholesaling, or lead generation is a big plus

Tools You May Use

Dialer (Mojo, CallTools, or similar)

CRM system

Google Sheets / Slack

Compensation

$300–$350 per month base salary

$500 bonus for every deal closed from your leads

Opportunity for long-term position and raises as the company grows

Schedule

Full-time

Monday – Friday

Aligned with U.S. business hours

How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:

1. Your cold calling experience

2. A short voice recording introducing yourself

3. Any experience with real estate or wholesaling

4. Your internet speed test

5. The word “Closer” in the first line of your application so we know you read the entire job post

title: Marketing Agency Operations and Account Manager
description:
We are a high-growth digital marketing agency specializing in high-performance paid advertising. We are looking for an organized Operations & Account Manager to work the day-to-day agency functions and bridge the gap between our internal strategy team and our valued clients, ensuring that every campaign is executed with precision and every client feels prioritized.



Working directly with the Founder and Campaign Manager, you will be responsible for building scalable systems, maintaining seamless communication, and driving client success. This is a long-term, full-time position with room for professional growth.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Communication

* Respond to client
s and messages

* Send campaign updates and monthly reports

* Schedule client calls when needed

* Ensure clients feel supported and informed



Operations & Project Management

* Manage tasks inside ClickUp, Asana, or similar tools

* Coordinate work with the campaign manager

* Track deadlines and campaign launches

* Ensure projects are completed on time



Client Onboarding

* Send onboarding forms to new clients

* Collect account access and assets

* Prepare campaign launch checklists



Performance Monitoring

* Monitor campaign KPIs such as leads, CPL, and conversions

* Flag performance issues to the campaign manager

* Ensure reports are accurate and delivered on time



Client Success

* Maintain strong client relationships

* Identify opportunities for account growth

* Ensure clients are satisfied with the service



REQUIREMENTS:

* Excellent written and spoken English

* Strong organization and project management skills

* Experience working with a digital marketing or PPC agency

* Experience with ClickUp, Asana, Trello, or similar tools

* Ability to manage multiple clients and projects



PREFERRED: 

* Basic knowledge of Google Ads or PPC

* Experience with Looker Studio or marketing reporting tools

* Client success or account management experience



Compensation & Logistics

Salary: $1,750 – $2,500 USD per month (commensurate with experience).



Schedule: Full-time (40 hours per week).



How to Apply:

To ensure you have high attention to detail, please follow these instructions precisely:



Start your application with the word SYSTEMS.



Record a 2–3 minute Loom video introducing yourself and detailing your specific agency experience.



Attach your Resume or LinkedIn profile.



IMPORTANT NOTE

Experience working with a digital marketing or PPC agency is strongly preferred.

title: Link Acquisition & Digital PR Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Us

We are Penji (penji.co), a fast-growing on-demand design service trusted by brands worldwide.

We are not interested in spammy backlinks, directory listings, or low-quality blog comments.

Instead, we’re looking for a smart, creative Link Acquisition & Digital PR Specialist who knows how to get brands featured on high-authority design, marketing, and business publications.

This role goes far beyond link building.

You’ll be building relationships with publishers, editors, and journalists — acting as the bridge between our content and the wider internet.



Your Mission

Find High-Value Opportunities

Research and identify relevant, authoritative websites, blogs, and journalists in the design, tech, marketing, and SaaS industries.



Write Outreach
s That Get Replies

Craft highly personalized cold
s that editors actually respond to — not generic templates that look automated.



Leverage Our Design Superpower

You’ll have access to our professional design team.

Use them to pitch infographics, visual data, and beautifully designed guest content that publications want to feature.



Build Relationships & Close Placements

Manage conversations with editors and site owners to secure high-quality backlinks through:

• Guest posts

• Digital PR features

• Broken link opportunities

• Resource mentions

• Strategic collaborations



Track Performance

We measure success based on quality, not volume.

Focus on securing links from sites with strong Domain Rating (DR) and real organic traffic.



Who We’re Looking For

You are a strategist, not a spammer.

? You would rather secure 3 DR60+ backlinks than 50 low-quality links

? You write persuasive, natural English that doesn’t sound robotic

? You understand how to build genuine relationships online

? You are resilient — rejection is part of outreach and doesn’t slow you down

? You know how to reverse-engineer competitor backlink strategies



Required Skills & Experience

? Proven Off-Page SEO experience with a portfolio of backlinks you personally secured

? Strong understanding of Google’s Link Quality Guidelines

? Expertise in Ahrefs or Semrush

? Experience with backlink gap analysis and competitor research

? Outreach tool experience such as Pitchbox, BuzzStream, or 

? Ability to identify real authority sites vs. link farms

? Commitment to strictly White Hat SEO practices



Why This Role Is Different

• Work with a globally recognized design brand

• Access to a team of professional designers to support your pitches

• Focus on quality PR-level placements, not spammy link quotas

• Opportunity to execute real digital PR campaigns



How To Apply

To make sure we review your application:

1? Complete the application form:


2? Attach your portfolio or examples of high-authority backlinks you’ve secured.

Applications without proof of outreach results will not be considered.

If you’re someone who loves strategic outreach, relationship-building, and landing placements on high-authority websites, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate



Application Instructions:

Fill out this form: 

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Customer Care Agent
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



As a Customer Care Agent at SureFire CPR, you will be the first voice students and clients hear. You will handle inbound calls, chats, and
s — providing accurate, empathetic service that reflects our mission to empower confident lifesavers.



This is a fully remote role. We are looking for someone who is calm under pressure, genuinely cares about people, and takes pride in doing things the right way — every single time.





WHAT YOU WILL DO



Answer inbound calls, chats, and
s with professionalism, warmth, and accuracy

Guide students through course details, scheduling, certification requirements, and testing

Resolve issues quickly by identifying root causes and following through to completion

Meet or exceed KPIs including response time, CSAT scores, and quality assurance metrics

Maintain detailed and accurate interaction records — document everything, double-check always

Collaborate with teammates and communicate proactively with leadership

Support special projects and operational tasks as assigned





WHO YOU ARE



You have at least 4 years of customer service experience (BPO, virtual assistant, or similar)

You communicate clearly and confidently in written and spoken English

You stay composed and positive when things get busy or a caller is upset

You are detail-oriented — you catch small things before they become big problems

You take ownership: if something goes wrong, you fix it and follow through

You are a team player who steps up without being asked

You have a stable internet connection and a quiet, professional work environment

You have access to two monitors (required for this role)

title: Virtual Assistant (Administration and Social Media)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail? oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to provide administrative support and take ownership of our social media presence. This is a contractor engagement, not an employment role. The successful contractor will operate as an independent service provider, managing their tools, and work methods while delivering agreed upon outcomes.



We prefer contractors with experience supporting international clients and who are comfortable working independently with minimal supervision.



** Please submit a 1 minute introduction video as part of your application



Scope of Work 



Social Media Management & Content Creation



• Independently manage and operate assigned social media accounts (e.g.,
, Instagram, LinkedIn)



• Create original social media content, including captions, basic graphics, and short? form posts



• Plan, draft, and schedule posts aligned with brand voice and objectives



• Monitor engagement and provide simple performance summaries



• Take ownership of content quality, consistency, and timely delivery







Administrative & Operational Support



• Complete defined administrative tasks such as inbox support, answering office calls, communications, data entry, document preparation, and basic research,



• Assist with day to day operational tasks based on clearly defined deliverables



• Proactively identify improvements and efficiencies within assigned work



Required Qualifications



• Prior experience as a Virtual Assistant or similar freelance role



• Strong written and verbal English skills with a clear or neutral accent



• Proven ability to work independently and deliver quality results with minimal supervision



• Reliable internet connection and backup power



• Ability to take calls or respond during agreed? upon availability windows







Preferred Qualifications



• Experience managing social media accounts for businesses



• Familiarity with remote collaboration tools and office software



• Strong time? management and organizational skills



• Experience working with international clients







Independent Contractor Requirements



• Operate as a freelancer or independent business



• Use own equipment, software, and work environment



• Control where work is completed



• Responsible for own taxes and statutory obligations





No employment benefits are provided under this contract.



Engagement & Compensation

• Starting half time, should be available 9 AM to 12 PM PST, with possibility to convert to longer working hours or full time.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
**Marketing Manager (Recruitment Marketing) – Remote, Philippines**



We’re on the lookout for a **Marketing Manager who lives and breathes recruitment marketing**—someone who gets just as excited about candidate experience and employer brand as they do about analytics and campaign strategy.



If you’re a creative problem solver who loves building brands, telling stories that resonate with job seekers, and partnering closely with Talent Acquisition teams, you might be our person.



This is a **remote role based in the Philippines**, and you’ll work with a global team that loves collaboration, big ideas, and making hiring feel more human.



**What You’ll Be Doing**



*   Own and evolve our **recruitment marketing strategy**—from EVP development to ad campaigns to social content that actually gets noticed.

*   Lead and coach a small (but mighty!) marketing team focused on creative, content, digital, and employer branding.

*   Bring our brand personality to life across career sites, job ads, social platforms, candidate touchpoints, and more.

*   Partner closely with Talent Acquisition to understand hiring goals and build campaigns that attract top talent.

*   Run digital campaigns across paid social, job boards, and programmatic platforms.

*   Keep an eye on candidate trends, market insights, and what’s happening in the talent space.

*   Track performance metrics and adjust strategies so we’re always leveling up.

*   Collaborate across teams (People Ops, Creative, Comms, etc.) to create a consistent and positive candidate experience.



**What We’re Looking For**



This role is for someone who’s both creative and analytical—someone who can brainstorm a campaign idea one minute and review performance dashboards the next.



*   7+ years in marketing, with solid experience in **recruitment marketing or employer branding**

*   Experience leading teams and managing projects from idea ? execution

*   Strong understanding of digital advertising, content strategy, and social media

*   Comfortable working remotely with global teammates

*   A natural communicator who loves bringing new ideas to the table

*   Bonus points if you’ve worked with ATS/CRM tools, paid job campaigns, or employer branding projects



**Nice-to-Haves (Not Required, But Awesome)**



*   Experience partnering with U.S.-based recruiting teams

*   Familiarity with platforms like LinkedIn, Indeed, Geofencing campaigns, programmatic job tools, or HubSpot

*   Background in fast?growing or high?volume hiring environments



 **Why You’ll Love Working With Us**



*   100% remote—work from anywhere in the Philippines

*   Supportive, collaborative team culture

*   Lots of room to be creative and take ownership



If this sounds like your kind of role, we’d love to meet you!

title: Own Your Results—Own Your Future
description:
(Cold Call Predator & Elite Closer | Real Base + Uncapped Pay | Full Autonomy & High Accountability)



Own Your Results—Own Your Future



Most companies talk about opportunity; we pay for it—every single month. Our best earners don’t chase quotas—they lap them. If you want a long-term sales seat (not a “gig”), extreme autonomy, and direct advancement based solely on metrics, read on. If not, keep scrolling.



Your Mission



100+ outbound calls per day to distressed property owners (tax defaults, inheritance, liens, etc.—you find the pain, you build rapport, you close)



Zero handoffs: You control the deal from initial outreach through close. No pass-offs, no excuses, no “support” teams to blame



Live in your numbers: You log every lead, every call, every stage—real-time, every day. Pipeline management is not optional.



Transparent scoreboard: Your results are public. You know exactly where you stand. Your pay and growth = your production. Period.



What We Provide



Real base (not a “draw”): You start with a guaranteed income while you stack your pipeline



No cap on commission: The only limit is your output. Top reps consistently double/triple their base—because they outperform



Everything but excuses: We deliver the tech, the data, and the process. You deliver the work ethic and skill



Clear promotion path: Prove yourself on the board, and you’re first in line for leadership roles, new territories, or team buildouts



Long-term security: We retain only top producers—those who meet or exceed daily/weekly metrics, quarter after quarter



Top Performers Are:



Obsessed with their own KPIs—love tracking, reporting, and improving



Comfortable with radical feedback, public rankings, and aggressive targets



Full-cycle closers who want a direct link between their actions and their earnings



Looking for a career seat—not a temp job, not “account management,” and never “just a lead generator”



Do NOT Apply If:



You dislike public, daily performance tracking



You need long ramp periods, constant encouragement, or handholding



You prefer “team closes,” handoffs, or a relaxed, untracked sales process



You don’t want to own the full sales cycle—start to finish



How to Apply – Two Steps Required (No Exceptions):



Resume: Must clearly show outbound calling and end-to-end closing experience. Include your personal best for daily calls & monthly closed deals.



2-Minute Unscripted Voice Memo:



State your name, country, and your record for calls in a single day



Break down your most challenging cold-to-close deal (real steps, negotiation tactics, outcome)



Share your daily tracking system for calls, leads, and pipeline



Explain why you want a career where your commission is tied directly to your scoreboard—not a relationship manager, not “just a job”



Applications missing either step, or not following these instructions, are auto-rejected.



Bottom Line:



This is a real seat for a real producer. Metrics, pay, and advancement are tied to your scoreboard—not your tenure, effort, or personality. Want in? Show us. If you want comfort, look elsewhere.

title: Accounts Payable Specialist (A/P Specialist)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagRcEzAT2P39Rr13/form



Note: Only applications submitted via the above link will be considered.



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Accounts Payable Specialist to join our close-knit accounting team. In this role, you will be in charge of making sure our company pays all of its bills on time and correctly, including vendors in the U.S. and overseas. If you are great with numbers, organized, and love making sure things are done right the first time, this job is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



- Take ownership of the full A/P process: receive and check invoices, enter them into our system, route them for approval, and make sure they get paid.

- Handle international vendor payments (payments to overseas factories). Carefully review each invoice for accuracy, match supporting documents (like shipping records and POs), and flag any inconsistencies before releasing payments.

- Double-check all invoices to ensure accuracy and compliance with company policies.

- Keep vendor contact info and payment details up to date in our system.

- Match vendor statements with our records and investigate any mismatches or errors.

- Ensure each expense is booked to the correct account, department, or project.

- Run weekly payment batches, including checks, ACH, credit card, and wire transfers.

- Respond to vendor
s and calls professionally and quickly.

- Work with other departments to solve payment issues and help prevent future ones.

- Support month-end close and annual audits by preparing A/P reports and documentation.

- Regularly create reports to help track payables and support financial decision-making.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Bachelor's degree in Accounting or a related field

- 5 to 7 years of hands-on Accounts Payable experience

- Strong skills in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUPs, etc.)

- Experience with accounting systems like SAP, NetSuite, or similar (a plus)

- Strong knowledge of A/P and general accounting principles

- Excellent attention to detail

- Good written and verbal English skills

- Self-motivated and able to manage deadlines independently

- Quiet home office setup with reliable internet and a dual-monitor setup (strongly preferred)

- Available to work full-time, 40 hours/week, from either 8:00 AM-5:00 PM or 9:00 AM-6:00 PM CST (Note: This is a night shift for PH-based tea
mbers)

- Alignment with our mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we are committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping, and low order minimums, we have become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 
.



Want to get to know us better and learn what it is like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 
/hea-ph-team



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?



At HiEnd Accents, we are a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, a growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights. We are proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



- Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow, and develop their careers

- Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you are working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

Job Description



We're seeking a highly capable and proactive Operations Lead to join our dynamic team at HiEnd Accents. The ideal candidate will be a problem-solver with strong leadership skills and a track record of driving operational efficiency.



What You’ll Do

s, faxes)

• Handling payment issues and order-related problems

• Providing information on inventory availability and product inquiries

• Phone outreach

- Proactively identify and resolve operational issues, developing and implementing solutions to prevent recurrence.

- Drive continuous improvement by:

• Analyzing operational data to identify trends and opportunities

• Collaborating cross-functionally to implement strategic changes

• Contributing to special projects aimed at improving performance and scalability

- Spearhead process documentation (SOP) creation, encompassing both refinement of existing procedures and development of new ones.

- Develop and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including customers, vendors, and internal teams.

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions, conversations, and issues using designated tools (e.g., Front and Airtable).

- Communicate effectively with the Warehouse team for shipment alignment.

- Perform other duties as assigned.



Who You Are



- A seasoned professional with 5+ years of experience in operations management, preferably in e-commerce or retail

- An experienced team manager

- Bachelor's degree in Business, Operations Management, or a related field

- Must have recent night shift (PH time) experience and be willing to report to work during CST hours

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights

- Excellent problem-solving skills with a solutions-oriented mindset

- Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities

- Proficient in the MS Office suite, with advanced Excel skills

- Experience with ERP systems and process automation tools

- Experience with SAP is not a requirement, but definitely a plus



Why HiEnd Accents?



Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, is a committed professional, and a straight shooter, you'll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.

photoshop

title: Virtual Assistant (LinkedIn & Operations Support)
description:
Company: designACE (
)

Location: Remote

Hours: 20–30 hours per week

Pay: $5 USD / hour

Potential: Opportunity to grow to full-time based on performance and business growth



About designACE

designACE helps entrepreneurs and professionals strengthen their presence on LinkedIn and build clear, compelling digital brands. Our work focuses on helping people show up online with clarity, confidence, and credibility.

We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who can support Andrew with organization, LinkedIn engagement, and light operational support.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, communication, and helping keep projects organized.



Role Overview

The Virtual Assistant will support the CEO (Andrew) by helping keep work organized, assisting with LinkedIn engagement, and supporting project coordination. Strong attention to detail and project management skills are essential for success in this role.



This role focuses primarily on:

+ Staying organized

+ Supporting LinkedIn engagement and post scheduling

+ Assisting with project coordination and documentation

+ Helping maintain clear communication with clients and tea
mbers



Key Responsibilities

1. Project Coordination & Organization

Help keep projects and tasks organized so work moves forward efficiently.



Responsibilities include:

+ Updating and maintaining project boards in Notion

+ Tracking tasks, questions, and high-priority items

+ Organizing project notes and updates

+ Preparing pre-read summaries and post-meeting recaps

+ Documenting action items and responsibilities fro
etings

+ Strong organization and attention to detail are essential for this part of the role.



2. LinkedIn Support

Support Andrew and designACE clients with LinkedIn engagement and scheduling.



Responsibilities include:

+ Scheduling LinkedIn posts for Andrew and select clients

+ Monitoring engagement on posts

+ Writing thoughtful comments on LinkedIn posts

+ Responding to LinkedIn messages when appropriate

+ Engaging with posts in Andrew’s network



Important: Comments and messages must be written without using AI tools. We want authentic human communication.



3.
 & Communication Support

Provide light administrative and communication assistance.



Responsibilities include:

+ Drafting
 responses when needed

+ Supporting
 organization and sweeps

+ Helping keep inboxes structured and prioritized

+ Preparing summary
s or updates when required

+ Organizing communications and maintaining clear written responses is a key part of the role.



4. Meeting Documentation

Help capture and organize key information fro
etings.



Responsibilities include:

+ Turning meeting transcripts or recordings into:

+ Meeting summaries

+ Key decisions

+ Action items

+ Organizing notes so they are easy to reference later

+ Adding tasks to appropriate notion boards 



5. Visual Content Coordination

Assist with preparing briefs for graphic design work.



Responsibilities include:

+ Preparing simple briefs for carousel posts or LinkedIn visuals

+ Providing background information or examples for the designer

+ Helping ensure posts follow the intended style, direction, and content plan



Ideal Candidate

+ Extremely organized

+ Strong in written communication; Fluent in written and spoken English

+ Detail-oriented

+ Comfortable working independently

+ Professional in online communication

+ Interested in LinkedIn and digital branding



Preferred skills:

+ Experience with Notion, LinkedIn, Chat GPT, Asana or another project management tool, Gmail and Google Drive.

+ Experience scheduling LinkedIn content

+ Experience supporting founders or small teams remotely



Working Hours

This role requires availability during the following hours:

Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM (EST)



Applicants must:

+ Be consistently available during these hours

+ Have a stable internet connection

+ Be available for interviews during this same time window



Performance Tracking: Tea
mbers are required to use the Timeproof application for work tracking. designACE uses a monthly 5-strike performance system to maintain high quality standards and support consistent performance.



Candidate Test Assignment

To help us evaluate candidates fairly, all applicants will complete a short assignment. This allows us to see how you think, write, and organize information. Estimated completion time: 1 hour



Application Instructions: 

Please respond to this post by including a link to your resume and/or portfolio.  

Please include in your message / application the sentence: “I’m excited to help people shine on LinkedIn.”

title: Executive Assistant / Virtual Assistant
description:
About KidGlov

KidGlov is a U.S.-based boutique marketing and branding agency serving purpose-driven organizations in healthcare, nonprofit, finance, and social impact.



We are organized, fast-moving, and strategy-focused. We’re looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Executive Assistant / VA who takes ownership and keeps operations running smoothly.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants stability and growth.



What You’ll Do



You will support executive leadership, business development, and marketing operations. You will meet with your supervisor each morning to discuss your task list for each day including but not limited to:



Calendar and Executive Support

• Confir
etings 24 hours in advance

s requiring action

s and prompt follow-up

mbers

Reporting and Analytics

Marketing and Campaign Support

s, landing pages, and forms before launch

title: Graphic Design and Digital Production VA
description:
About KidGlov



KidGlov is a U.S.-based boutique marketing and branding agency serving purpose-driven organizations in healthcare, nonprofit, finance, and social impact.



We are organized, fast-moving, and quality-focused. We’re looking for a highly capable Graphic Design and Digital Production VA who can keep projects moving and carry them through to the finish line.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants stability, growth, and consistent creative work.



What You’ll Do



You will support our creative and marketing teams with design production, digital asset creation, and campaign support. You will meet with your supervisor every morning to review priorities and deadlines, including but not limited to:



Graphic Resizing and Production

• Resize graphics for both print and digital formats

• Adapt existing creative across multiple sizes and placements

• Prepare final production-ready files for print and digital use

• Save, package, and organize final files correctly

• Ensure correct specs, bleed, resolution, and export settings



Digital Ads and Animation

• Build and resize static and animated digital ads

• Animate digital ads using Adobe tools

• Create simple animations in Canva

• Export ads in correct formats for platforms

• Maintain consistency across ad sets and campaigns



Design Support

• Execute designs aligned with brand standards

• Maintain strong typography, layout, and spacing consistency

• Make detailed refinements before creative is sent to clients

• Support social media graphics production

• Work from existing brand guidelines and templates



Website and Content Updates

• Make light updates in WordPress

• Make light updates in Squarespace and/or Wix

• Upload and format images correctly for web

• Ensure design consistency across platforms



Presentation and Marketing Materials

• Format and design PowerPoint presentations

• Adapt creative for slides and pitch decks



Creative Workflow Support

• Keep creative projects moving efficiently

• Follow tasks through to completion without constant supervision

• Maintain organized file structures

• Communicate clearly about deadlines and blockers



Required Skills and Tools

• Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign required)

• Strong understanding of print vs. digital design specifications

• Experience creating, animating, and resizing digital ads

• Canva (including animation features)

• WordPress, Squarespace and Wix

• PowerPoint

• Production-level file preparation experience

• Strong English communication skills

• Reliable computer and stable high-speed internet



Bonus Skills (Not Required but Preferred)

• Adobe After Effects

• Experience working in a marketing agency



Who You Are

• Detail-oriented and highly organized

• Strong eye for design and typography

• Able to execute within established brand systems

• Proactive and able to keep projects flowing

• Comfortable receiving feedback and making revisions

• Reliable and consistent



Compensation and Schedule

• $4–6/hour depending on experience

• Performance-based increases

• Paid semi-monthly

• Full-time

• Must overlap with U.S. Central Time

• Philippines-based applicants only



Please include in your application:

1. Your resume

2. A link to your portfolio (required)

3. List of tools you are proficient in

4. Your internet speed

5. What specifically about this role interests you

6. The word “Production” in your subject line

title: Shopify Store Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please fill out the application form: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagwn3KJ9biX7VeNO/form



Given the high volume of applicants, we will not be able to consider applications not submitted through this form. Thank you for your understanding!



POSITION DETAILS: SHOPIFY STORE SPECIALIST



MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.



KEY OUTCOMES:

* Product Setup: Efficiently set up new products on assigned accounts according to agreed-upon listing standards, ensuring a 99.8% upload rate.



* Store Optimization: Within the first 6 months, boost our store's conversion rate to the industry average of 2.0%



* Record Maintenance: Maintain 100?curacy in Airtable record-keeping and weekly KPI report tracking.



* Inventory Feeds: Achieve 99?curacy in inventory feed uploads and maintain timely inventory updates, with no more than one error per quarter; do periodic spot checks of >10 items on each platform per week to verify site accuracy



* MAPP Adherence: Maintain 100% compliance with the company's MAPP; violations resolved within 72 hours



* New Ideas: Implement >2 major new ideas per quarter to improve account performance through a mix of competitor research and the latest Shopify/eCom sales strategies



OTHER REGULAR RESPONSIBILITIES:

* SOP Creation and Maintenance: Update/maintain SOPs that encompass the product setup process, store optimization, and more.



* Performance Analysis and Reporting: Every week, analyze sales and other KPIs to understand site performance, identify areas for improvement, and inform data-driven decision-making. Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.



* Cross-functional Collaboration: Monitor daily order flow and collaborate with internal teams such as Customer Service and Marketing to resolve issues and ensure a seamless and integrated approach to store management.



* Market Research: Keep tabs on competitor strategies to inform listing strategy and overall account strategy.



* Promotions and Discounts: Develop and manage promotional campaigns to drive sales, increase customer retention, and enhance brand visibility.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:

* Organized home office setup, free of noise and distractions, with a dual monitor setup strongly preferred.



* Reliable power and internet connections, with backup systems in place.



* Full-time position, 40 hrs/week minimum, with partial overlapping hours or entirely overlapping hours with US Central time



* 2-3 years of experience with Shopify site maintenance



* 1+ years of experience with Shopify site optimization, including CRO work



* Must have substantial previous Excel experience, including experience working with flat files



* Excellent English skills



* High attention to detail, with the ability to meticulously proofread for spelling and grammar



* Ability and willingness to independently learn new tools, products, or technology and make recommendations on trends to support the business



* Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and professional with the ability to multitask and prioritize workload; ability to work independently with minimal supervision is extremely important



* Ability to work with our team via
, Slack, and
/Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion



* Stable, trustworthy, highly dependable. Ideally, someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



* Commitment to HiEnd Accents' mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and sells premium bedding and home textiles — quilts, sheets, decorative pillows, duvets, and more — that bring everyday luxury into people's homes. We've been family-owned and operated since 2005, now in our second generation of leadership, and are headquartered in Dallas, Texas.



We serve thousands of retailers, interior designers, department stores, and boutique hotels across the United States through four distinct brands spanning a range of styles and price points. Our growth has been recognized nationally: we've been named to the Inc. 5000 (a prestigious list of America's fastest-growing private companies) two years running, and have received multiple industry awards for product excellence.



We're a company of around 45 people — small enough that every person matters, established enough that you're joining something real and growing.



Discover more at 
.



Why HiEnd Accents?

We're growing our team in the Philippines because we believe in finding the best people regardless of geography — and investing in them for the long term.



As a family-owned company, we don't treat our tea
mbers as interchangeable. We take the time to build real working relationships, we care about your professional development, and we want every person who works with us to leave with stronger skills than when they started. That's a genuine commitment from our leadership, not a line in a job posting.



Learn more about our Philippines team here: Meet the HiEnd Accents Team in the Philippines (
) 



What you can expect:

You'll work directly with our core team in Texas — not through layers of management or a BPO intermediary. Your contributions will be visible, your ideas heard, and your growth supported.



-Compensation & Benefits— Competitive pay benchmarked to PH market rates for skilled roles, not entry-level floors. Paid time off, including vacation days and holidays, plus 13th-month pay.

- Real Career Growth— We're expanding quickly, which means new roles and responsibilities open up regularly. We actively develop our people through mentorship, skill-building, and increasing ownership of projects.

-A Team That Feels Like a Team — We're a close, collaborative group that celebrates wins together. You'll know your teammates by name — including leadership.

title: Media Buyer
description:
We are a U.S.-based digital marketing agency scaling rapidly, and we’re hiring an experienced Media Buyer with a proven track record of managing high-budget Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns that deliver real ROI.



Responsibilities



Plan, launch, and optimize Meta Ads campaigns for multiple clients (mostly service-based: landscapers, pool builders, contractors, etc.).

Analyze performance data and continuously improve CTR, CPL, CPA, and ROAS.

Write and test ad copy variations, visuals, and offers with our creative team.

Build reporting dashboards and provide performance summaries to management.

Scale successful campaigns and manage ad budgets exceeding $2k/month per client.

Collaborate closely with copywriters, video editors, and account managers for campaign success.



Requirements



Minimum 3 years of experience in Meta Ads buying and optimization.

Proven results with screenshots or case studies (before/after metrics, ad spend, cost per lead, etc.).

Deep understanding of Meta Ads Manager, pixel setup, tracking, retargeting, and A/B testing.

Experience running ads for service-based or local businesses (home improvement, construction, landscaping, etc.) is a big plus.

Must understand creative strategy (ad angles, hooks, storytelling, audience psychology).

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) is preferred.

Good English and communication skills.



To Apply



Start your message with:“I read the sentence and I have managed profitable ads.”

Include your Loom video link (with all required steps). Applications without this line will be ignored.

title: Accounts Payable Manager
description:
Accounts Payable Manager



Location: Philippines (Fully Remote)

Schedule: US Mountain Time 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM Philippine Time (Mon–Fri)

Salary: PHP 85,000 – 100,000 PH pesos per month (based on experience)

Employment Type: Full-Time Employee



THE ROLE



We're looking for a highly organized and people-first Accounts Payable Manager to own our AP function across a family of home furnishings brands. In this role, you are the connective tissue between our vendors and our internal teams — keeping relationships strong, communication clear, and payments running on time.

You'll lead a small AP team, serve as the primary point of contact for vendors and cross-functional colleagues, and make sure the end-to-end AP process runs smoothly across multiple entities. This is a role for someone who takes pride in being responsive, organized, and trusted by everyone they work with.

This is a full-time employee position (not contract work) working remotely from the Philippines on US Mountain Time hours (12:00 AM – 8:00 AM Philippine Time, Monday through Friday).



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Team Leadership

- Lead, mentor, and develop the accounts payable team — setting clear expectations, supporting growth, and keeping the team performing at a high level

- Manage day-to-day workflows, workload distribution, and quality of output across the team

- Foster a culture of accountability, accuracy, and continuous improvement within the AP function



Vendor Communication & Relationships

- Serve as the primary point of contact for vendors — handling payment inquiries, resolving discrepancies, and maintaining strong, professional relationships

- Manage the AP inbox and ensure all vendor communications receive timely, accurate, and professional responses

- Proactively communicate with vendors on payment timelines, issues, or changes — reducing friction and building trust

- Escalate and resolve complex vendor disputes in a way that protects the company's relationships and cash position



Internal Collaboration & Cross-Functional Communication

- Act as the AP liaison to internal teams across all brands — including operations, purchasing, and brand finance — ensuring smooth coordination on invoice approvals, PO matching, and expense workflows

- Communicate clearly and proactively with US-based accounting leadership on AP status, aging, exceptions, and process improvements

- Partner with cross-functional stakeholders to resolve coding questions, approval bottlenecks, and payment holds in a timely manner

- Support new vendor onboarding by coordinating with internal teams and ensuring vendors are set up correctly in the system



AP Process & Controls

- Own the end-to-end AP process — from invoice receipt and coding through approval, payment execution, and reconciliation

- Prepare and process electronic payments via ACH and check across multiple entities

- Verify and reconcile vendor statements, ensuring discrepancies are identified and resolved promptly

- Maintain accurate, organized records of all AP transactions

- Support month-end close activities including AP accruals and aging analysis

- Assist with audit preparation and provide documentation as needed



WHAT YOU BRING



Required:

- 4+ years of experience in accounts payable or a similar accounting role, with at least 1–2 years in a supervisory or team lead capacity

- Exceptional communication skills — you write clearly, respond promptly, and are comfortable navigating both vendor relationships and internal stakeholder conversations

- Prior US accounting experience strongly preferred

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and GAAP practices

- Proficiency in MS Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUPs, and data reconciliation)

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

- Strong organizational skills — you can manage a high volume of transactions, communications, and competing priorities without dropping the ball

- Self-directed with a strong sense of ownership and follow-through

- Own laptop/computer capable of running accounting software

- Stable high-speed internet connection for remote work



Preferred:

- Ramp experience

- NetSuite experience 

- QuickBooks Online (QBO) experience

- 
 experience 

- E-commerce or retail industry background



WORK ENVIRONMENT

Fully remote from the Philippines

Dedicated, quiet workspace required

US Mountain Time schedule: 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM Philippine Time, Monday through Friday

Daily collaboration with a US-based accounting team and cross-functional colleagues across multiple brands



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Competitive salary: PHP 85,000 – 100,000 per month, based on experience

13th month pay

Government-mandated benefits: SSS, PhilHealth, and Pag-IBIG

Paid time off (PTO) and volunteer days

Full compliance with Philippine labor law

Work with a growing, collaborative team (both Philippines and US-based)

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter — Canadian AI Company
description:
We're Lumin Marketing Group, a Canadian tech company based in Edmonton, Alberta. We help businesses across Canada stop losing customers to missed phone calls using AI-powered call handling.



You'll be cold calling Canadian businesses (plumbers, dentists, salons, HVAC companies, etc.) to introduce our service and book 15-minute demo appointments. You are NOT selling anything on the phone — just booking appointments.



What you'll do:



Make 40-50 outbound calls per 4-hour shift using our browser-based phone system

Follow a proven word-for-word script (provided)

Book demo appointments using our online calendar

Log every call in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

Submit a daily report (Google Sheets template provided)

What we provide:



Full training + detailed SOP with scripts and objection handling

Fresh call lists every week (you never hunt for leads)

CRM with built-in phone dialer (no phone costs for you)

Daily report template that auto-generates

$1 USD bonus per demo that shows up

Requirements:



Clear spoken English with neutral accent

6+ months B2B cold calling experience

Reliable internet (10+ Mbps)

USB headset with mic, quiet workspace

Available Mon-Fri during 9AM-5PM Mountain Time (Canada)

To apply, please include:



A 30-60 second voice recording introducing yourself as if calling a business owner

Your cold calling experience (industry, daily volume)

Your internet speed (speedtest.net result)

Wage/Salary: $4/hour

title: Bid Solicitor
description:
Responsibilities



Market & bench building

*Build and continuously expand TriArc’s qualified trade partner database by trade, geography, capacity, and performance.

*Run ongoing prequalification (financials, safety, workload, bonding) in coordination with Accounting.



Bid strategy & scheduling

*Publish the rolling Bid Calendar; align milestones with Estimators/PMs and owners/architects.

*Break down drawings/specs into clear trade packages; assign scope sheets and alternates.



ITB execution

*Prepare Invitation to Bid packages (drawings, specs, addenda, bid forms, alternates, due dates, delivery method).

*Post to BuildingConnected; segment targeted lists; personalize top-tier outreach.



Relentless follow-up

*3-touch cadence (Day 1
 + Day 3 call/text + Day 5 confirmation) and pre-deadline “nudge” to secure commitments.

*Track interest/no-bid reasons; backfill gaps early; escalate risk areas to Estimating.



Bid intake & leveling

*Receive bids, confirm inclusions/exclusions, and level against scope sheets; flag outliers and VE options.

*Package a clean Bid Leveling Matrix for Estimators/PMs with award recommendation.



Data & feedback loops

*Score and rate trade partner performance post-award (price accuracy, quality, safety, schedule).

*Run post-bid debriefs; capture lessons learned to refine future ITBs.



Brand & relationship

*Be TriArc’s front door for subs: fast answers, fair process, respectful communication, and values-based partnership.





Required Traits & Skills

*Excellent Communication Skills

*Hunter mentality: proactive, persistent, upbeat on the phone; comfortable making 30–50 quality contacts/day in peak cycles.

*Construction fluency: understands typical scopes (CSI divisions), alternates, addenda, and gaps that derail bids.

*Process discipline: lives in checklists, documents everything.

*Communication: crisp writing, professional phone presence, tact with hard-bid deadlines.

*Values fit: Do what you say • Do the right thing • Gumption • Stick-to-itiveness • Passion/Enthusiasm.



Nice-to-Have

*Customer Service / Appointment Setting experience

*GC pre-con/bid desk experience or supplier/manufacturer rep background.

*Existing DFW sub network across interiors, ground-up flex/industrial, retail shells.



Key KPIs & Scorecard (reported weekly)

*% trade packages with 3+ bids (primary KPI)

*Avg. bids per trade

*% bids on time

*coverage gaps prevented (and when caught)

*Prequal completion rate / expirations cured

*Diversity/bench depth by top 15 trades

*ITB Bid cycle time

*Trade partner satisfaction pulse



Sample Weekly Cadence

*Mon: Publish bid calendar; align with Estimators; identify coverage risks.

*Tue–Thu: ITB sends, follow-ups, phone blocks, addendum broadcasts, pre-deadline confirmations.

*Fri: Deliver leveled bid matrices; update KPIs; partner thank-you touchpoints.



Technical Requirements:

*Computer: Intel i5 processor or equivalent with at least 8GB RAM

*Internet: Minimum 50 MBPS download speed

*Dual Monitor is required

*Noise cancellation headset

*HD Cam (Clutter Free, Ideally Plain Well-lit background)



Job Details:

*Job Type: Full-time (40 hours per week)

*Schedule: Monday to Friday 8:30 AM – 4:30 PM CDT - Monday to Friday 9:30 PM - 5:30 AM PHT

*Salary Range: PHP 40,000 – 65,000 monthly, depending on experience.



Application Instruction:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagO7KL90nGSfhiE9/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Remote Accountant / Bookkeeper (UK based)
description:
Job Title: Remote Accountant / Bookkeeper (UK based)

Company: Ripple Dental 



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)



Work Schedule: Full-time (40 hours/week), UK Business Hours



About the Role

Ripple Dental Care is seeking a highly experienced, detail-oriented Accountant to manage our financial health day to day. You will be responsible for maintaining pristine records, ensuring compliance with UK tax regulations, and providing our management team with the insights needed to grow the practice.

title: Accounts Receivable / Accounts Payable Specialist
description:
Location: Lingo Staffing, Inc.- Corporate



Reports to: Controller



Job Overview: We are seeking a detail-oriented and motivated Staff Accountant to join our accounting team. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of accounting principles and a focus on key areas such as Accounts Receivable (AR), Accounts Payable (AP), payroll, payroll taxes, and journal entries. This position requires accuracy, time management skills, and the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously.



Key Responsibilities:

• Accounts Receivable (AR):

o Reconcile customer accounts and follow up on outstanding payments.

o Assist with resolving payment discrepancies or billing inquiries.

o Ensure all AR-related transactions are recorded properly in Avionte.

• Accounts Payable (AP):

o Review and process vendor invoices in a timely manner.

o Ensure compliance with payment terms and company policies.

o Prepare and process payments to vendors.

o Reconcile vendor statements to ensure accuracy and resolve discrepancies.

• Payroll Taxes:

o Assist with payroll tax calculations and ensure compliance with local, state, and federal tax laws.

o Prepare payroll tax filings, including quarterly and annual returns (e.g., 941, state tax filings).

o Reconcile payroll tax accounts to ensure accuracy and timely filing.

o Maintain and track tax-related documents for auditing purposes.



Qualifications:

• Minimum of 2-3 years of experience in accounting, preferably with AR, Payroll tax experience a plus

• Some experience with QuickBooks preferred

• Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel 

• Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

• Ability to handle multiple tasks and meet deadlines.

• Strong communication skills and ability to work in a team-oriented environment.



Work Environment: This role is typically performed in an office setting with regular working hours. 

*M-F 8a-5p Eastern standard time.



Compensation: Competitive salary based on experience.

title: Graphic Designer – 15 Custom Patterns for Beachwear Brand (Project-Based)

$500CAD Payment Milestone: 25% upfront after the first 3 patterns are approved, 75% upon final delivery of all files.



Bonus: If the quality exceeds expectations and the files are perfectly print-ready, a bonus will be discussed for future seasonal collections.

title: AI Automation & Systems Architect
description:
AI Automation & Systems Architect

n8n · Zapier · GoHighLevel · AI Workflow Development



About This Role

WE are hiring an automation specialist to help us work smarter. We need someone who can look at how our business runs, find the parts that slow us down, and build systems that fix them. 



What You'll Work On

You'll be involved in every part of our automation — from spotting the problem to building the solution. Here's what that looks like in practice:

* AI customer service — building systems that respond to customers automatically via chat, phone, and text

* Lead management — making sure new leads get captured, tagged, and followed up with — without anyone doing it manually

* CRM workflows — keeping our GoHighLevel system organized and running on its own

* Connecting tools — linking our platforms together so data flows where it needs to go

* Reporting — setting up dashboards and alerts so leadership always knows what's happening



Your Day-to-Day

* Look for problems. Review how we currently do things and find where we're wasting time or dropping the ball.

* Plan the solution. Map out how the automation should work before building anything.

* Build it. Create workflows using n8n, Zapier, GoHighLevel, and other tools. Set up AI systems that handle real customer conversations over phone, text, and chat.

* Keep improving it. Once something is built, you'll monitor it, improve it, and suggest what to tackle next.

* Talk to leadership. You'll join weekly calls to share updates, discuss what's next, and help shape our automation roadmap.



What We Need From You

Tools you should know:

*n8n and Zapier (day-to-day workflow building)

*GoHighLevel (our main CRM — experience here is a big plus)

* Webhooks and APIs (connecting tools and passing data between them)

* AI automation (building bots or agents that handle customer questions automatically)



Pay

$1,500 – $2,500/month, based on your experience and skill level.

We may start with a short contract or trial period. If it's a good fit, this becomes a long-term role.



How to Apply

We want to see how you actually think and work, so our process has a few steps:

Step 1 — Application

Send us your resume or portfolio. Show us what you've built, what tools you use, and what platforms you've connected.

Step 2 — Short Video (5–10 minutes)

Record a Loom video walking us through an automation you built. Tell us what the problem was, how you solved it, and what the result was.

Step 3 — Short Exercise

We'll ask you to pick a common business problem — like managing new leads or handling customer questions — and explain how you'd automate it. No need to build anything, just walk us through your thinking.

Step 4 — Paid Test Project

If you make it to this stage, we'll pay you to complete a small project. You'll design an AI customer service system that connects to phone and text and works with our CRM. This helps us see how you work in real conditions.



 your portfolio and loom video to 



OLJ messages will not be entertained!!

title: Content Writer | Copywriter |
description:
We are looking for a creative writer who knows how to stop the scroll using human psychology, not ChatGPT prompts.



Most e-commerce ads today feel robotic, stale, and "AI-generated." We want the opposite. We need a writer who can create high-converting text overlays and scripts for 
 and
 that sound like a real person talking to a friend—authentic, raw, and persuasive.



The Mission

Your job is to take our product concepts and turn them into short-form video scripts that people actually want to watch.



Write the "Hook": Create 5 different ways to grab attention in the first 2 seconds.



Craft the "Body": Explain the "Why" behind the product without sounding like a technical manual.



The "Call to Action": Guide the viewer to the shop in a way that feels natural, not pushy.



What We Value (The "Human" Touch)

Slang & Rhythm: You understand how people actually talk on social media. You know when to use a fragment, a joke, or a specific cultural reference.



Empathy: You can get inside the head of a customer and speak to their specific frustrations or desires.



Storytelling: Even in a 15-second ad, you can create a mini-narrative that holds interest.



Zero AI Reliance: If your writing sounds like it was generated by a bot, it’s a "no" for us. We want your unique brain, your wit, and your specific writing style.



Requirements

Portfolio: Show us examples of video ads you’ve written for e-commerce.



Platform Knowledge: You understand the difference between a "polished"
 ad and a "lo-fi" TikTok video.



Speed & Iteration: Ability to write multiple versions of the same ad so we can test what works best.

title: Amazon OA Specialist & Store Manager (USA)
description:
I am seeking a dedicated, high-level Virtual Assistant to launch and manage a new Amazon US Online Arbitrage store. I am looking for a long-term professional who can work independently and navigate the strict 2026 Amazon landscape to deliver consistent, profitable results.



???? Your Responsibilities

Sourcing: Identify 5–10 high-velocity OA leads daily using SellerAmp and Keepa.



Store Management: Full handling of Seller Central, including listing products and monitoring account health.



Logistics & Boxem: Create and manage shipments using Boxem. You will ensure 100% compliance with Amazon’s inbound box rules (standard weight under 50 lbs and specific safety labeling) to avoid the high 2026 Inbound Defect Fees.



3PL Coordination: Act as the primary bridge between our suppliers and our Prep Center. You will send "Buy Lists," track deliveries, and provide the 3PL with FBA labels and clear prep instructions.



Ungating: Proactively manage the ungating process. You must know how to identify "Auto-Ungate" opportunities and handle the application process for gated categories/brands.



Reporting: Update our Google Sheet daily with ROI, net profit (after 3PL and shipping fees), and sales velocity.



???? Requirements

Experience: 2+ years working with US-based Amazon sellers (specifically in Online Arbitrage).



Software Mastery: Expert-level Keepa, SellerAmp, and Boxem/InventoryLab.



Logistics Knowledge: Proven ability to communicate professionally with US-based 3PL services and an understanding of the 2026 requirement for third-party prep.



Compliance Expert: Deep understanding of Amazon’s inbound performance requirements and IP Risk management.



Reliability: High-speed internet and a "problem-solver" mindset.



???? Benefits

Fixed Bi-Weekly Salary: Reliable, on-time payments.



Performance Bonuses: Additional bonuses provided based on the store's profit growth and meeting sourcing targets.



Long-Term Partnership: I am looking for a core team member to grow with the business.



Flexible Hours: Work on a schedule that fits your productivity.



???? How to Apply (Read Carefully)

To be considered, your application must include the following:



Proof of Work: Attach 2–3 screenshots of Keepa charts for products you have successfully sourced in the past.



The Logic Test: * Explain why the products in your screenshots were "good buys" (mention Sales Rank, 90-day Buy Box stability, and competition).



If a product is gated, what are the first two steps you take to try and ungate it?



What is the maximum weight a standard box can be for FBA, and what happens in 2026 if a shipment has "Inbound Defects"?



Software: Confirm which Amazon tools you currently have active access to.



Attention to Detail: What is your favorite animal and why?



Subject Line: Please make your subject line: [Your Name] - Amazon VA Rockstar 2026

title: Data Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly driven, hands-on Data Engineer to own and execute our end-to-end data architecture — from requirements definition to system design, implementation, deployment, and long-term operations.

You will build and operate scalable, production-grade data infrastructure that powers analytics, AI systems, and GIS workloads. This role requires both strong engineering fundamentals and a DevOps mindset — you will not only build systems, but deploy, monitor, and maintain them in cloud environments.



Key Responsibilities

 End-to-End Data Ownership

- Translate business and product requirements into scalable technical solutions

- Design clean, maintainable data architecture and workflows

- Implement robust ETL/ELT pipelines

- Ensure long-term maintainability, monitoring, and optimization

- Own deployment, reliability, and ongoing operations



Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps

- Architect and manage cloud infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- Work with Firebase and managed services

- Containerize and deploy services using Docker

- Implement CI/CD workflows using GitHub

- Ensure high availability, scalability, and cost efficiency

- Establish logging, monitoring, and data governance standards



Data Engineering & Systems

- Build and maintain batch and streaming pipelines

- Design and optimize PostgreSQL schemas, indexing, and performance

- Implement data validation, observability, and reliability checks

- Support AI-driven and GIS-based data workflows



Must-Have Technical Skills

Hands-on production experience with:

- PostgreSQL (schema design, indexing, performance tuning)

- Python (modern dependency management, uv preferred)

- Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- Firebase

- Docker (containerization & deployment)

- GitHub (version control, CI/CD workflows)

You must be capable of independently deploying and maintaining systems in production.



Nice to Have (Strong Plus)

Experience with GIS / Geospatial systems, such as:

- Shapely

- QGIS

- GDAL

- GeoPandas

- H3

- Google Maps API

Experience working with spatial datasets, spatial indexing, or map-based analytics is a significant advantage.



Experience Requirements

- 3–5 years of experience in Data Engineering or related roles

- Strong foundation in data systems and backend software engineering

- Experience building and operating production-grade systems

- Experience working with cloud-native architectures



Soft Skills

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- Clear, structured communicator

- Collaborative, low-ego, team-first mindset

- Self-driven and proactive

- Strong ownership mentality — you finish what you start

- Comfortable leveraging AI-assisted coding tools to improve productivity



Preferred Background

- Experience working in remote or distributed teams

- Startup or fast-paced environment experience

- Exposure to AI-coding



Submit your application along with your resume and portfolio link in a google drive link.

title: Medical Billing Specialist (Physical Therapy) – Virtual Assistant
description:
GymFit Physical Therapy is seeking an experienced Medical Billing Specialist (Virtual Assistant) to support our physical therapy clinic’s revenue cycle operations.



This role is responsible for submitting claims to insurance companies after therapists complete documentation, managing accounts receivable, and following up on unpaid claims to ensure accurate and timely reimbursement.



The ideal candidate has prior experience working with U.S. healthcare billing systems, understands CPT/ICD coding basics, and has experience with insurance claim submission and follow-up.

This is a remote position working with a U.S. physical therapy company.



Key Responsibilities



Claims Processing

-Review completed therapy notes and ensure documentation is ready for billing

-Submit insurance claims through clearinghouses or EMR systems

-Ensure claims are submitted accurately and promptly



Insurance Follow-Up

-Monitor claim status with insurance companies

-Follow up on unpaid or delayed claims

-Correct and resubmit rejected or denied claims



Accounts Receivable Management

-Review aging reports and prioritize outstanding claims

Payment Posting

-Reconcile EOBs and ERA payments

-Update patient accounts in the billing system



Billing Documentation

-Ensure patient information and insurance data are accurate

-Maintain organized records of claims and billing notes

-Enter all billing and payment information into the system properly and without errors

-Communicate billing issues to management when necessary



Required Qualifications

-Prior experience in U.S. medical billing

-Experience with insurance claim submission and follow-up

-Understanding of CPT codes and ICD codes

-Experience working with clearinghouses or EMR systems

-Proficient mathematical skills

-Strong attention to detail

-Excellent written and spoken English

-Strong customer service skills

-Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with U.S. healthcare providers remotely.



Medical billing
