title: BIM and structural Modeler
description:
Job Posting: BIM Modeler

Chinook Engineering

Civil Infrastructure & Bridge Design Specialist



Position Overview

We are hiring a BIM modeler specializing in civil infrastructure and bridge design. You will work with PyRevit scripting, Tekla Structures structural design software, and Autodesk Revit to automate our design workflow, generate bridge geometry drawings, and produce detailed construction drawings. You will also use Claude AI to further streamline and automate modeling tasks. Together, we will build and refine a comprehensive library of reusable detail families for bridges and civil infrastructure, including Civil 3D topography, Revit TopoSolids, and Tekla structural models. API integration between these platforms is required. All communication and project meetings will occur via Microsoft Teams at scheduled times in Pacific Daylight Time.

Key Responsibilities

• Model civil infrastructure and bridge structures using both Tekla Structures and Autodesk Revit

• Develop and automate design workflows using PyRevit scripting and Claude AI

• Generate bridge geometry and detailed construction drawings across both platforms

• Build and draw using Civil 3D to draw stream and road profiles and cross sections for contract documents

• Work with Civil 3D topography and Revit TopoSolids for terrain and site modeling

• Build and maintain a reusable library of detail families for civil infrastructure projects

• Integrate APIs between Revit, Civil 3D, Tekla Structures, and other design platforms as possible

• Coordinate drawing production and model management across multiple projects



Required Skills & Experience

• Proficiency in Tekla Structures structural design software (required)

• Proficiency in Autodesk Revit and PyRevit scripting and Revit TopoSolids

• Revit family creation and library management

• Experience with Civil 3D topography 

• API integration experience between design software platforms

• Strong background in civil infrastructure and bridge design

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple drawing sets



Tools & Software

• Tekla Structures (structural design software)

• Autodesk Revit with PyRevit scripting

• Autodesk Civil 3D

• API integration tools and development

• Claude AI (for workflow automation)

• Microsoft Teams (for communication and meetings)



Communication & Schedule

All communication and project meetings will be conducted via Microsoft Teams at scheduled times. The project manager is based in Washington State, USA (Pacific Daylight Time / Pacific Standard Time). Candidates must be available for scheduled video meetings during Pacific time zone hours.



How to Apply

Please apply only if you have demonstrated experience with Tekla Structures, Revit, Autodesk Civil 3D, PyRevit scripting (using Claude AI as needed), civil infrastructure projects, and API integration. Include the following with your application:

• Portfolio or examples of bridge and civil infrastructure models in Tekla Structures and Revit

• Description of your PyRevit scripting and API integration experience

• Examples of Civil 3D topography or Revit TopoSolids work

• Your availability for Pacific Daylight Time meetings

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Role: Virtual Assistant 

Hours: Full-time U.S. business hours



Overview:

We’re looking for a proactive, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to support day-to-day operations, marketing execution, and light growth initiatives. This role blends administrative support with digital execution, creative tasks, research, and forward-thinking problem-solving. The ideal candidate is organized, curious, comfortable with modern tools (including AI), and able to operate with minimal hand-holding after a reasonable training period.

Support will always be available to ensure mutual success.

This is not a purely reactive task role; we’re looking for someone who can think ahead, suggest improvements, and help simplify how work gets done.



Core Responsibilities

Proactive Support

• Aside from the items we know we need help with, provide ideas and recommendations based on your skillset and what the business could use help with.



Website & Digital Support

• Make updates and changes to a Squarespace website (small, simple website)

• Add and manage content  (pages, blog posts, images, basic formatting)

• Create simple website banners and imagery as needed



Graphic & Creative Support

• Create simple graphics for things like:

o LinkedIn posts

o Website imagery

o Podcast thumbnails 

• Work from brand direction and existing examples (not heavy design work)



AI & Productivity – we are not looking for expertise per se, but curiosity and the aptitude/drive to learn.

• Use AI tools to improve efficiency and speed (content drafts, summaries, ideas, workflows)

• Apply basic critical thinking when using AI (not just copy/paste)

• Rework prompts to achieve desired outcomes 

• Create a prompt library of successful and commonly used prompts 



Calendar & Admin Management

• Manage calendar and scheduling

• Coordinate meetings, provide event support, and help us focus on priorities

• Keep schedules clean, organized, and proactive

• Familiarity with Hubspot



LinkedIn & Light Growth Support

• Support LinkedIn publishing and organization

• Assist with light outbound sales activities (research, follow-ups, list prep)



Video, Podcast & Content Publishing

• Curiosity and willingness to help with basic video editing (AI tools are easy to learn and use)

• Assist with podcast workflows, including:

o Publishing to Spotify and podcast platforms

o Managing basic episode assets and descriptions



Writing & Communication

• Strong written English skills 

• Clear, professional, and concise communication



Bonus: Vacation Rental Growth & Optimization

When capacity allows, this role may also support growth initiatives for two vacation rental properties, including:

• Brainstorming and executing strategies to drive more traffic and bookings

• Supporting SEO / GEO (Generative Search Optimization) efforts for property listings and websites

• Helping improve listing descriptions, imagery positioning, and discoverability

• Researching platforms, keywords, and promotional ideas to increase occupancy

• Identifying creative ways to differentiate the properties and increase demand



Compensation Note for Rental Growth:

There is openness to discussing a commission or performance-based incentive tied to measurable increases in booked stays or revenue, based on mutually agreed goals and tracking.



Preferred Skills & Experience

• Strong experience working with Squarespace and Hubspot

• Proficiency with LinkedIn (platform knowledge, posting, basic engagement)

• Ability to create simple graphics (Canva, Figma, or similar tools)

• Comfort using AI tools to increase efficiency

• Excellent organizational and time-management skills

• Strong written English

• Ability to work independently and think critically

• Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

• Highly curious and motivated to learn new skills



Nice-to-Haves

• Basic video editing experience

• Podcast publishing experience

• Familiarity with outbound sales or event support

• Interest in marketing, growth, and modern tools

• Curiosity around SEO and demand generation



What Success Looks Like

• You make things easier 

• Calendars are clean, content is updated, and tasks move faster

• Growth opportunities are identified and acted on proactively

• You operate like a trusted extension of the business, not just task support

 with cover letter explaining why you are the best candidate for this post.  We will reach out to shortlisted candidates with an invitation for an interview.  This is an urgent post. We will be shortlisting candidates within the week.



Thank you.

title: Commission Inquiry Coordinator
description:
JOB TITLE: Commission Inquiry Coordinator

REPORTS TO: Director, Revenue Operations



The Commission Inquiry Coordinator plays a critical support role on the Revenue Assurance team, ensuring that open commission inquiries are actively monitored, accurately documented, and promptly communicated. This role is ideal for a highly organized, detail-oriented individual who thrives on process and consistency. By owning the operational upkeep of inquiry tickets, the Coordinator frees the commissions analyst team to focus on high-value analytical and partner-facing work.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES (PH-tailored)



-Monitor the commissions inquiry inbox on a set cadence aligned to US business hours (night shift PH time), triaging updates from distributors (TSDs) and suppliers per SOP.

-Log and update partner-facing tickets in the internal CRM/ticketing tool (e.g., Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot) with clear notes, correct statuses, and time stamps to meet SLAs.

-Check TSD and supplier portals bi-weekly (or as required), capture evidence (screenshots/files), and document findings in the ticket and tracker.

-Send timely follow-ups to TSDs and suppliers on overdue inquiries; escalate per escalation matrix when response SLAs are missed.

-Recognize issues needing analytical review or partner communication and hand off to the assigned commissions analyst with complete context and attachments.

-Maintain audit-ready records and data integrity across ticketing, spreadsheets, and commission systems; manage file versions in Google Drive/SharePoint.

-Assist with shared inbox management (labels, rules, routing) to direct inquiries to the correct analyst or queue and flag urgent items.

-Prepare and maintain trackers and weekly status reports (volume, aging, response times, resolutions) for the Revenue Operations team.

-Support month-end/quarter-end activities, including bulk ticket updates, portal sweeps, and meeting cut-off timelines.

-Contribute to process documentation and continuous improvement; update SOPs/checklists when changes are implemented.

-Ensure compliance with data privacy and confidentiality requirements (company policies, GDPR/CCPA where applicable).

-Provide clear end-of-shift handovers to ensure continuity between PH and US teams.



QUALIFICATIONS :



-Bachelor’s degree preferred; alternatively, 2+ years of BPO/back-office or
 support experience in operations, billing, finance ops, order management, or similar.

-Strong attention to detail and data accuracy; proven track record handling high-volume, repetitive tasks with minimal errors.

-Excellent written and professional English; comfortable communicating with US-based stakeholders and external vendors.

-Proficiency in Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel (filters, lookups/VLOOKUP or XLOOKUP, pivot tables, conditional formatting, data validation).

-Experience with ticketing/CRM systems (e.g., Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot); Jira or ServiceNow is a plus.

-Ability to follow defined SOPs, meet SLAs, and appropriately flag exceptions/escalations.

-Comfortable working across multiple systems and supplier portals simultaneously; fast learner with strong keyboard skills (e.g., 45+ WPM with high accuracy).

-Strong organizational and time-management skills; skilled in maintaining trackers and clear documentation.

-Willing and able to work night shifts aligned to US time zones, including select Philippine holidays and month-end/quarter-end overtime when needed.

-Reliable remote setup (e.g., at least 25 Mbps internet, backup connectivity/power, quiet workspace); or openness to onsite/hybrid as required by the company.

-Familiarity with handling sensitive financial or commission data and adherence to confidentiality/data privacy policies.

-Nice to have: experience in telecom or IT channel environments, revenue assurance, commissions or billing support, and vendor/partner communications.



If you feel you meet the qualifications above, please send your resume to 
 with a cover letter stating why you are the best candidate. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed. We will ONLY reach out to qualified candidates. Thank you.

title: Construction VA
description:
Responsibilities



Market & bench building

*Build and continuously expand TriArc’s qualified trade partner database by trade, geography, capacity, and performance.

*Run ongoing prequalification (financials, safety, workload, bonding) in coordination with Accounting.



Bid strategy & scheduling

*Publish the rolling Bid Calendar; align milestones with Estimators/PMs and owners/architects.

*Break down drawings/specs into clear trade packages; assign scope sheets and alternates.



ITB execution

*Prepare Invitation to Bid packages (drawings, specs, addenda, bid forms, alternates, due dates, delivery method).

*Post to BuildingConnected; segment targeted lists; personalize top-tier outreach.



Relentless follow-up

*3-touch cadence (Day 1
 + Day 3 call/text + Day 5 confirmation) and pre-deadline “nudge” to secure commitments.

*Track interest/no-bid reasons; backfill gaps early; escalate risk areas to Estimating.



Bid intake & leveling

*Receive bids, confirm inclusions/exclusions, and level against scope sheets; flag outliers and VE options.

*Package a clean Bid Leveling Matrix for Estimators/PMs with award recommendation.



Data & feedback loops

*Score and rate trade partner performance post-award (price accuracy, quality, safety, schedule).

*Run post-bid debriefs; capture lessons learned to refine future ITBs.



Brand & relationship

*Be TriArc’s front door for subs: fast answers, fair process, respectful communication, and values-based partnership.





Required Traits & Skills

*Excellent Communication Skills

*Hunter mentality: proactive, persistent, upbeat on the phone; comfortable making 30–50 quality contacts/day in peak cycles.

*Construction fluency: understands typical scopes (CSI divisions), alternates, addenda, and gaps that derail bids.

*Process discipline: lives in checklists, documents everything.

*Communication: crisp writing, professional phone presence, tact with hard-bid deadlines.

*Values fit: Do what you say • Do the right thing • Gumption • Stick-to-itiveness • Passion/Enthusiasm.



Nice-to-Have

*Customer Service / Appointment Setting experience

*GC pre-con/bid desk experience or supplier/manufacturer rep background.

*Existing DFW sub network across interiors, ground-up flex/industrial, retail shells.



Key KPIs & Scorecard (reported weekly)

*% trade packages with 3+ bids (primary KPI)

*Avg. bids per trade

*% bids on time

*coverage gaps prevented (and when caught)

*Prequal completion rate / expirations cured

*Diversity/bench depth by top 15 trades

*ITB Bid cycle time

*Trade partner satisfaction pulse



Sample Weekly Cadence

*Mon: Publish bid calendar; align with Estimators; identify coverage risks.

*Tue–Thu: ITB sends, follow-ups, phone blocks, addendum broadcasts, pre-deadline confirmations.

*Fri: Deliver leveled bid matrices; update KPIs; partner thank-you touchpoints.



Technical Requirements:

*Computer: Intel i5 processor or equivalent with at least 8GB RAM

*Internet: Minimum 50 MBPS download speed

*Dual Monitor is required

*Noise cancellation headset

*HD Cam (Clutter Free, Ideally Plain Well-lit background)



Job Details:

*Job Type: Full-time (40 hours per week)

*Schedule: Monday to Friday 8:30 AM – 4:30 PM CDT - Monday to Friday 9:30 PM - 5:30 AM PHT

*Salary Range: PHP 40,000 – 65,000 monthly, depending on experience.



Application Instruction:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagO7KL90nGSfhiE9/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Real Estate Transaction Coodinator
description:
**Position: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (Remote | Philippines)**



The Bhagat Group, a fast-growing real estate team based in the South Bay area of Los Angeles, is looking for an **experienced Real Estate Transaction Coordinator** to manage transactions from contract to closing.



This role requires someone who already understands the U.S. real estate transaction process and can step in immediately without training.



**Important:**

This position requires **prior experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator**. If you have not worked as a TC in real estate before, please **do not apply**, as we need someone who can start immediately.



**About the Role**



You will be responsible for managing multiple transactions at the same time and ensuring every file moves smoothly from **accepted offer to closing** while keeping agents, clients, escrow, and lenders informed.



**Key Responsibilities**



• Manage real estate transactions from contract to close

• Review purchase agreements and ensure all required documents are complete

• Track contingency timelines and contract deadlines

• Coordinate with agents, escrow officers, lenders, inspectors, and clients

• Maintain communication with all parties throughout the transaction

• Upload and manage documents in the transaction management system

• Ensure files meet brokerage compliance requirements

• Keep agents informed about key dates and missing documents



**Absolute Requirement**



• Must have **previous experience working as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator**

• Must understand the **U.S. real estate transaction process**

• Must be able to manage transactions independently with minimal supervision



**Strong Preference**



• Experience working with **California real estate transactions**

• Experience working with **eXp Realty**

• Experience with **SkySlope, Dotloop, or similar transaction platforms**

• Familiarity with **Follow Up Boss or other CRMs**



**Requirements**



• Excellent English communication skills

• Highly organized and detail oriented

• Ability to handle multiple files at the same time

• Reliable internet connection and professional work environment



**Compensation**



Competitive salary based on experience.



**How to Apply**



Please send:

• Resume

• 2 minute video introduction

• List of transaction platforms you have used

• Description of your experience with U.S. real estate transactions



Only candidates with **real estate transaction coordinator experience** will be considered.

title: Remote Resident Safety & Operations Assistant
description:
Remote Resident Safety & Operations Assistant (Night Shift – Long-Term Role)



Company: Ecolux Senior Living (California, USA)

Location: Remote – Philippines

Schedule: Night Shift (aligned with California time)

Type: Full-time or Part-time

Salary: Based on experience



About Us

Ecolux Senior Living is a boutique assisted living company in California dedicated to providing compassionate and high-quality care for seniors.

We are looking for a reliable, trustworthy, and detail-oriented Remote Resident Safety & Operations Assistant who will help monitor our care homes during nighttime hours and assist with administrative and marketing tasks.

This is a long-term role with opportunity to grow as our company expands.



Your Main Responsibilities

1. Resident Safety Monitoring



During night hours you will:

• Monitor camera feeds of common areas in our care homes

• Watch for resident movement, falls, wandering, or unusual activity

• Alert caregivers immediately if a resident needs help

• Maintain a simple activity log during your shift

Your role helps ensure our residents remain safe at all times.



2. Resident Communication

Occasionally you may:

• Communicate with residents through an iPad or video device

• Provide friendly reassurance if they appear confused or restless

• Notify caregivers if assistance is needed

Compassion and patience are very important for this role.



3. Caregiver Task Review

You will help ensure quality care by:

• Reviewing caregiver tasklists and checklists

• Confirming tasks such as hygiene care, room cleaning, activities, and assistance have been completed

• Reviewing videos of caregiver work when necessary

• Reporting any concerns or missing tasks to management



4. Administrative Assistance

During quieter hours you may assist with:

• Updating resident logs

• Organizing files in Google Drive

• Updating spreadsheets or dashboards

• Reviewing
s or documents

• Preparing simple daily reports



5. Social Media & Marketing Support

You will also help with marketing tasks such as:

• Reviewing activity videos and testimonials

• Editing short clips using tools like Canva or CapCut

• Uploading videos to YouTube,
, and Instagram

• Helping organize resident and family testimonials

• Assisting with simple social media posts



End of Shift Report

At the end of each shift you will provide a short summary including:

• Resident activity or i

• Caregiver task review notes

• Administrative work completed

• Marketing work completed



Requirements

We are looking for someone who is:

• Honest and dependable

• Compassionate and patient

• Detail-oriented and observant

• Comfortable working overnight hours

• Able to follow procedures carefully



Skills & Tools

Helpful experience includes:

• Google Docs / Google Sheets

• Video monitoring systems

• Social media platforms

• Basic video editing (Canva, CapCut, etc.)

• Virtual assistant or admin work



Healthcare or senior care experience is a plus but not required.



Equipment Requirements

• Reliable high-speed internet

• Computer with webcam

• Headset

• Quiet workspace



Why Work With Us

• Stable long-term job

• Friendly and supportive team

• Opportunity to grow with the company

• Meaningful work helping seniors live safely and comfortably



To Apply

Please include:

A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with remote work or monitoring roles

Your internet speed

A short video introduction (1–2 minutes preferred)

title: Appointment Setter - Business Development
description:
Remote | Full-Time or Part-Time Opportunity



We are seeking a motivated and professional Appointment Setter / Business Development Manager to support our growing business development efforts. 



This role focuses on identifying potential clients, initiating conversations, and scheduling qualified meetings and helping get attendees to events. 



Position Overview:

The Appointment Setter / Business Development Manager will be responsible for conducting outbound outreach to prospective clients and scheduling meetings for senior leadership. You will play a key role in generating new opportunities and helping expand business relationships. This is a remote position requiring strong communication, consistency, and professionalism.



Key Responsibilities:

• Conduct outbound outreach via phone,
, LinkedIn, and text messaging

• Identify and engage key decision makers within organizations

• Introduce company services and create interest in learning more

Qualifications

title: Account & Sales Coordinator
description:
Account & Sales Coordinator

Concierge Drop · Full-Time · · Immediate Start



130+ Active Buildings$90–100k Monthly Revenue150 Building 2026 GoalGrowing Team



About Concierge Drop

Concierge Drop is a premium on-demand home services company operating inside NYC residential buildings. We pick up and deliver dry cleaning, handle home cleaning, dog walking, apartment turnovers, uniform cleaning, and more — all from the building lobby. No apps, no hassle. Residents text us, we handle everything.

We're in 130+ buildings across Manhattan, doing $90–100k/month in revenue, and growing fast. Our 2026 goal is 150 buildings. We've built a full tech platform to support that growth — and now we need someone sharp to make sure every account runs smoothly and every opportunity gets followed through.



The Role

This is not a narrow, task-based VA role.

You'll be the connective tissue between our buildings, our vendors, and our growth. One hour you're updating account records and flagging an at-risk building. The next you're drafting a follow-up
 to a property manager. Then you're tracking down a service issue. Then you're helping prep a proposal for a new building. This role requires someone who stays organized under pressure, follows tasks through to completion, and takes ownership without being asked twice.



What You'll Do

Account Management — Keep Buildings Healthy



Monitor account health across the portfolio: booking activity, service issues, invoices, and engagement

Draft and send check-in
s to property managers on behalf of the team

Flag at-risk accounts and surface upsell opportunities (buildings using one service that should have three)

Log all touchpoints, contacts, and updates in our account management platform

Coordinate with CS and operations when buildings report problems



Sales Support — Keep the Pipeline Moving



Research and build lists of target buildings by neighborhood, unit count, and management company

Support outreach sequences — drafting
s, tracking responses, updating pipeline stages

Prepare proposals and pitch materials for prospective building partners

Track all outreach and follow-up activity in the sales platform



Operations & Admin — Keep Things Running



Coordinate between internal teams and vendors when service issues escalate

Support new building onboarding — scheduling intro calls, portal setup, first-booking follow-through

Generate weekly account health and pipeline summaries for the CEO

Help manage the B2B inbox and ticket queue alongside the CS team





Who You Are

The most important thing: you follow through.

Tasks don't fall through cracks. You have a system. You stay on top of a lot of moving pieces, and you communicate proactively when something needs attention.

Must-Haves



2+ years of experience in account management, sales support, virtual assistance, or client-facing operations

Excellent written English — you can write a professional
 to a New York property manager without it sounding templated

Strong organizational skills — you track everything, nothing slips

Comfortable working across CRM tools, Google Workspace,
 platforms, and task managers

Self-directed — you don't need daily hand-holding to know what to do next

Available to overlap with NYC business hours (EST) for at least 5–6 hours per day

Reliable internet connection and a clean, professional setup for occasional video calls



Strong Differentiators



Experience supporting US-based clients or companies remotely

Background in real estate, property management, or building services

Familiarity with CRM or account management platforms (HubSpot, Notion, Airtable, etc.)

Spanish fluency a strong plus — many of our vendor and building contacts are Spanish-speaking

You've worked in a fast-moving startup or small team before



This Role Is NOT For You If...



You need detailed instructions for every task to get started

You disappear when you're unsure about something instead of asking

You treat this like a task queue — you want someone who thinks about outcomes, not just checkboxes

You're looking for a slow-paced, low-accountability role





How Performance Is Measured

This role is evaluated on outcomes, not just activity:

MetricWhat It MeansAccount capture rateAre active buildings actually using services? Are engagement levels growing?Follow-through rateAre flagged tasks and accounts resolved without reminders?Pipeline hygieneIs outreach being tracked, followed up, and moved forward consistently?ResponsivenessAre property managers, vendors, and internal teammates getting timely responses?

Top performers have a path to performance bonuses and expanded responsibility as we grow.



Compensation & Details



$6/hour · 40 hours/week · Full-time

Paid weekly via [Wise / Deel / your preferred method]

Performance bonuses tied to account capture rate and retention metrics

Remote — work from anywhere in Latin America

Direct access to the CEO and US-based leadership team

Real growth opportunity — this company is scaling fast and we promote from within





How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with the subject line:

Account & Sales Coordinator — [Your Name]



A short note (3–5 sentences) on how you stay organized when you have too many things going on at once

Your resume or LinkedIn

One example of a time you managed multiple accounts, clients, or tasks simultaneously — what did you do, and what was the result?



We will not review applications without the short note. That's the most important part.



Concierge Drop · New York City ·

title: Remote Team Coach
description:
Job Summary:

The Remote Team Coach is responsible for leading, mentoring, and supporting a team of Virtual Assistants (VAs) to ensure high-quality performance, adherence to established processes, and continuous professional development. The ideal candidate demonstrates strong leadership experience—preferably in a BPO or remote work environment—and has a proven ability to coach teams, implement effective processes, and drive overall team performance.



Key Responsibilities:



*Lead, mentor, and motivate a team of Virtual Assistants to maximize productivity and performance.

*Conduct regular performance evaluations, coaching sessions, and provide clear, actionable feedback.

*Develop and implement training programs, standard operating procedures (SOPs), and performance improvement plans.

*Monitor team KPIs to ensure targets, service standards, and deadlines are consistently achieved.

*Serve as the primary point of contact for escalations, operational challenges, and performance-related concerns.

*Foster a positive, collaborative, and productive remote work environment.



Requirements:



*Minimum of 2-3 years of leadership experience, preferably in a BPO or remote team environment.

*Demonstrated experience in coaching, mentoring, and managing teams.

*Strong communication, interpersonal, and problem-solving skills.

*Proven ability to implement processes, drive productivity, and maintain team accountability.

*Comfortable working during U.S. business hours and managing remote teams across different time zones.

title: Hiring VIDEO EDITOR for MUSIC Education Company
description:
Hello, my name is Yakub Saputra, founder of Kubistra Music.



I run an online jazz education business that helps musicians from around the world understand jazz more deeply and actually apply it in their playing. We’ve built an audience of over 31,000 followers on Instagram, an
 list of over 9,000 subscribers, and we’ve served more than 1,000 students through our programs.



We are currently looking for a highly skilled video editor to build a long-term working relationship with as our in-house video editor for Kubistra Music.



I personally has been editing all my videos, but now it’s time to get somebody better than me to take over.



We are specifically looking for someone who is well-versed in CapCut and Final Cut Pro (or DaVinci Resolve), and who can create edits that match the style, quality, and energy of our existing top-performing videos. And create an even better, innovative and effective video in the future.  



Your work will mainly require these skill sets:



1. High-level video editing for short-form reels, long-form YouTube videos, and sales videos

2. Strong motion graphics and animation skills, with the ability to create visuals that are consistent with the Kubistra Music brand

3. Repurposing content effectively across formats, along with thumbnail design that fits our visual style and improves performance

4. Understanding of music and jazz is a **major plus. But not required.**



We are looking for someone who is reliable, communicates clearly in English, works with fast turnaround times, pays close attention to detail, and takes feedback well.



You will need to understand the voice, teaching style, personality, and creative direction behind Kubistra Music, and be able to translate that into edits that feel aligned with the brand.



If you feel you are a good fit for this role, please watch this quick video with **instructions on how to apply**: 



I only review applications from people who pay close attention to detail, and I will not review your application unless you watch that video first.



I look forward to hearing from you, and I’m excited to potentially work together.



Best of Luck,



Yakub Saputra

title: Junior Systems Administrator (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a proactive Junior Systems Administrator to help manage and maintain the IT infrastructure and business applications for our diverse group of clients. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring that our clients' systems are secure, up-to-date, and performing optimally.

 

This is a dynamic MSP role where no two days are the same. You will move between different client environments, gaining hands-on experience managing various cloud setups, security protocols, and enterprise software. This is a perfect role for someone who wants to move beyond basic helpdesk support and into multi-tenant systems management.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Client System Administration

   - Assist in the administration of core business platforms for clients (e.g., Microsoft 365, Entra ID/Active Directory, and CRM systems).

  - Monitor client system health, performance, and security logs to identify and resolve potential issues proactively.

  - Manage user onboarding/offboarding, permissions, and access levels across various client software platforms.

*Security & Compliance Management

  - Help implement and enforce security best practices for clients, including MFA, password policies, and endpoint protection.

  - Assist with software patching, updates, and system backups to ensure client data integrity and business continuity.

  - Participate in basic security audits and help document compliance procedures for client environments.

*Infrastructure & Network Support

  - Support the configuration and maintenance of client network devices (firewalls, switches, and Wi-Fi access points).

  - Assist in managing client cloud infrastructure and virtual environments.

  - Troubleshoot hardware and software issues escalated from the general support level.

*Documentation & Client Communication

  - Maintain accurate records of client system configurations, hardware inventory, and software licenses.

  - Create and update "How-To" guides and technical documentation for client users and internal tea
mbers.

  - Provide clear, professional updates to clients regarding the status of their systems and projects.



Qualifications (Required)

*Technical Foundation: 0–3 years of experience in IT support or a related technical role (MSP experience is a major plus).

*Operating Systems: Strong familiarity with Windows 10/11 and a basic understanding of Windows Server.

*Cloud Basics: General knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration (users, groups, and licenses).

*Networking Knowledge: Understanding of basic networking concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPNs).

*API Awareness: Basic understanding of how APIs work and comfort navigating technical documentation.

*Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a strong customer-service mindset.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

*Experience with virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) or cloud platforms (Azure, AWS).

*Familiarity with security tools (Antivirus, Firewalls, MDM solutions).

*Any IT certifications (CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft Fundamentals).



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (1989) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Video Editor
description:
About This Role

We’re Five Star Napkins - the luxury cocktail napkin trusted by Michelin-starred restaurants, five-star hotels, and Forbes Travel Guide establishments.



We’re looking for a world-class, performance-driven video editor who lives and breathes DTC creative. Someone who understands that creative is the targeting, that pacing determines attention, and that ads must follow human psychology. 

You’ll be transforming raw UGC, studio footage, product demos, and stock into thumb-stopping Meta ads that follow modern DTC best practices: fast cuts, strong curiosity loops, bold hooks, high proof density, and clean, legible captions.

This role is for someone who actively studies why ads win or lose—who stays ahead of platform trends and has a real POV on creative decision-making. 



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-performing paid ads across Meta, TikTok, and IG using:

- Fast-paced, retentive structures (accelerated cuts, zooms, reframes, beatswitches, micro-pattern breaks)

- Platform-native pacing, tuned to stop scroll in the first 1–3 seconds

- Curiosity-driven narrative flow that mirrors winning DTC storytelling frameworks

- High clarity captioning (safe-zone-aware, legible, bold, timed to beats)

- Sound design that feels native: punchy SFX, transitions, pacing-based music, platform-familiar audio trends

- Build ad variants with different hooks, angles, and proof placements

- Export clean 9:16 files with proper A/V safe zones and compression settings





What You Already Know (Non-Negotiables)

- Deep understanding of DTC performance editing

- You think in consumer psychology

- You understand why ads fail

- You’ve already edited tens or hundreds of performance ads

- Preferably inside a DTC brand, performance marketing agency, UGC studio, or eCom growth team.



Required Skills

- 3–5+ years cutting Meta, TikTok, IG Reels, ads

- Strong graphic design skills (motion graphics, overlays, compelling typography, safe-zone mastery)

- Ability to craft hooks, pattern breaks, and narrative arcs based on best-practice frameworks

- Fluent in Premiere, Capcut, Canva

- Understanding of performance KPIs: scroll-stop rate, hold rate, IPM, CTR, thumb-stop ratio

- Ability to follow structured creative frameworks 



Why Join Us?

At Five Star Napkins, we’re scaling a brand that’s as luxurious as our content is a central part of that growth.



This role is your opportunity to:

- Work with a brand trusted by the most prestigious establishments in the world

- Help shape the look, feel, and performance of a high-end DTC brand’s next chapter

- Collaborate with celebrated creators, luxury tastemakers, and top-tier partners

- Be part of a tight, creative team that values quality, performance, and experimentation

title: Fleet Operations Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagAngW4vGhmYYNVB/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Accounting Operations Specialist (Multi-Entity)
description:
About the role

We're a group of independent companies — including data-driven direct mail and real estate consulting and investment — looking for a sharp, self-directed Accounting Operations Specialist to own our day-to-day financial operations. You'll be the person who keeps the books clean, the reconciliations current, and the reporting accurate, working closely with various departments and leadership across our portfolio.

This role is high-trust and high-visibility. You'll work with real numbers that drive real decisions, with direct access to leadership and the autonomy to build and improve the processes you own. Working hours : 9AM CDT to 6PM CDT (one hour lunch).

________________________________________

What you'll do

• Manage daily bookkeeping across multiple business entities, including transaction entry, receipt review, and accounts receivable (A/R) monitoring

• Process accounts payable (A/P), record sales, refunds, expenses, and payroll, and reconcile across entities

• Maintain accurate, audit-ready records in QuickBooks Online and supporting systems (including Airtable)

• Monitor and resolve Stripe payment disputes and follow up on unpaid accounts

• Perform monthly bank, credit card, and account reconciliations — consistently hitting close deadlines

• Track intercompany balances, loan payments, and member distributions

• Maintain financial reports and supporting spreadsheets; flag discrepancies proactively

• Support month-end close with timely, accurate data across all entities

________________________________________

What success looks like

Within 90 days, you're running the monthly close independently, reconciliations are current, and any A/R aging issues have a clear resolution path. By six months, you've identified at least one process improvement that saves time or reduces error.

________________________________________

Required qualifications

• 2+ years of bookkeeping or accounting operations experience

• Strong, hands-on proficiency with QuickBooks Online

• Demonstrated ability to manage multiple entities or accounts simultaneously

• Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail — you catch things others miss

• Comfortable with cloud-based tools and digital workflows

• Clear written communication skills, including professional A/R follow-up correspondence

title: Account Manager
description:
# Account & Growth Manager

**Concierge Drop · Part-Time (20 hrs/week) · Remote / Work from Home · Immediate Start**



---



| 130+ Active Buildings | $90–100k Monthly Revenue | 150 Building 2026 Goal | Path to Full-Time |

|---|---|---|---|



---



## About Concierge Drop



Concierge Drop is a premium on-demand home services company operating inside NYC residential buildings. We handle dry cleaning, home cleaning, dog walking, apartment turnovers, and more — all from the building lobby. Residents text us, we handle everything.



We're in 130+ buildings across NYC and growing fast. We don't just want more buildings — we want every building we're already in to be a thriving, active account. That's where you come in.



---



## The Role



**You own the health of every building we operate in.**



This is not a passive account management role. You know every building cold — its capture rate, its signage status, its bag stock levels, its last touchpoint, its property manager's name. You look at the numbers every week and you know which buildings need attention before anyone has to tell you. Then you do something about it.



You'll coordinate with our events team when we're activating in a building, make sure dry cleaning and wash & fold bags are stocked, flag when signage needs to be checked, keep property manager relationships warm, and execute promotions targeted at underperforming accounts. You report directly to the CEO.



As we scale toward 150 buildings, the right person in this role has a clear path to owning the full account and growth function — including new building acquisition and eventually managing a team.



---



## What You'll Do



### Portfolio Intelligence & Reporting

- Own a live dashboard of every active building — capture rate, booking activity, stock levels, signage status, last communication

- Generate weekly account health reports for the CEO with clear flags and recommended actions

- Know your numbers — spot trends, identify underperforming buildings, and surface insights proactively

- Track all account activity, contacts, and notes in our platform



### Operations Coordination

- Monitor dry cleaning bag and wash & fold bag inventory across buildings — flag restocks before they run out

- Track signage status across the portfolio and flag buildings that need a check or refresh

- Coordinate with the events team when building activations or pop-ups are happening

- Support new building onboarding — intro coordination, portal setup, first-booking follow-through



### Account & Relationship Management

- Manage communication cadence with property managers across the portfolio

- Draft and send introduction
s to new property managers on behalf of the CEO

- Check in regularly with building contacts — keep relationships warm and responsive

- Flag at-risk accounts early and have a plan ready



### Promotions & Engagement

- Look at the numbers and identify which buildings need a promotional push

- Plan and execute building-level campaigns: first-booking offers, re-engagement sequences, seasonal promotions

- Draft resident-facing communications — welcome
s, service announcements, promo drops

- Coordinate with property managers to get promotions in front of residents — building apps, newsletters, lobby materials

- Build repeatable templates so successful campaigns can be rolled out across the portfolio



---



## Who You Are



**You're numbers-first, operationally sharp, and a strong writer.**



### Must-Haves

- 2+ years in account management, operations, marketing, or a combination

- Comfortable working with data and reporting — you know your numbers and act on them

- Excellent written English — you can write a polished
 to a NYC property manager and a compelling promo to a building resident

- Highly organized — you track everything across a large portfolio and nothing slips

- Self-directed — you see what needs attention and address it without being told

- Available to overlap with NYC business hours (EST) for at least 4–5 hours per day

- Reliable internet and a professional setup for occasional video calls



### Strong Differentiators

- Experience managing a large portfolio of accounts or locations

- Background in marketing, campaign execution, or resident/tenant communications

- Experience supporting US-based clients or companies remotely

- Familiarity with CRM or operations tools (HubSpot, Airtable, Notion, Google Sheets)

- Experience in property management, real estate, or building services



### This Role Is NOT For You If...

- You need to be told what needs attention — you should already see it in the numbers

- Writing doesn't come naturally to you

- You treat reporting as a formality rather than a tool for action

- You're looking for a slow-paced, low-accountability environment



---



## How Performance Is Measured



The core metric is **capture rate** — are residents in your buildings booking services, and is that number growing?



| What We Track | What Good Looks Like |

|---|---|

| Building capture rate | Engagement growing month over month across the portfolio |

| Operational accuracy | Bag stock and signage issues flagged before they become problems |

| Reporting quality | Weekly summaries delivered on time, accurate, and actionable |

| Relationship health | Property managers are responsive and engaged |

| Promotion execution | Campaigns go out on schedule and move the numbers |



Strong performance at 20 hours leads directly to a full-time offer.



---



## Compensation & Details



- **$6/hour · 20 hours/week · Part-time to start**

- Path to full-time (40 hrs/week) based on performance — evaluated at 60–90 days

- Performance bonuses tied to capture rate improvements

- Paid weekly via Wise or direct bank transfer

- Remote — work from home

- Direct access to the CEO and US-based team



---



## How to Apply



Send the following to 
 with the subject line:

**Account & Growth Manager — [Your Name]**



1. A short note (3–5 sentences) on how you stay organized when managing a large number of accounts or tasks simultaneously

2. One example of a time you used data or reporting to identify a problem and take action — what did you do, what was the result?

3. Your resume or LinkedIn



**We will not review applications without both the note and the example. That's how we know you can think and write.**



---



*Concierge Drop · New York City · 
*

title: Video Editor & SEO Content Specialist (Remote)
description:
Talent Connect Inc. is seeking a creative and detail-oriented Video Editor & SEO Content Specialist to support our marketing and digital content initiatives. The ideal candidate will be responsible for editing short-form and long-form videos while optimizing content for search visibility across platforms such as YouTube, Instagram, and Google.



This role requires a combination of video editing skills, content strategy, and SEO knowledge to help grow our digital presence and attract international candidates interested in training programs in the United States.

Key Responsibilities

Video Editing



Edit short-form and long-form video content for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and LinkedIn



Create engaging video intros, transitions, subtitles, and visual enhancements



Design YouTube thumbnails and video graphics



Optimize video format and resolution for different platforms



Maintain consistent branding across all video content



SEO & Content Optimization



Conduct keyword research for YouTube, Google, and social media



Write SEO-optimized video titles, descriptions, and tags



Optimize content for YouTube search rankings



Develop SEO-friendly blog or article content related to video topics



Analyze performance using analytics tools and recommend improvements



Requirements



Proven experience with video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve



Understanding of SEO principles and keyword optimization



Experience optimizing content for YouTube and social media platforms



Ability to create engaging visual storytelling



Knowledge of social media trends and short-form video formats



Strong attention to detail and organizational skills



Reliable high-speed internet connection



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with YouTube channel growth strategies



Familiarity with tools such as TubeBuddy, VidIQ, or Google Keyword Planner



Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)



Experience creating Instagram carousel posts or social media visuals



Application Process



Interested candidates may be asked to submit:



Portfolio of video editing work



Examples of SEO-optimized content



A short trial task to demonstrate editing and optimization skills



Talent Connect Inc. is a U.S.-based organization that facilitates international hospitality and culinary training programs through the J-1 Exchange Visitor Program, connecting talented individuals from around the world with training opportunities across the United States.

title: Senior U.S. Mortgage Underwriter (Non-QM) – Remote
description:
Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Experience Level: Senior / Managerial

Department: Mortgage Operations / Underwriting



About Us



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based mortgage company specializing in Non-QM and traditional loan solutions nationwide. As our organization continues to expand, we are seeking an experienced Senior Mortgage Underwriter with strong decision-making abilities, leadership potential, and advanced expertise in Non-QM loan products.



This role is ideal for someone who excels in a fast-paced lending environment, can operate independently, and consistently delivers accurate and compliant underwriting decisions.



Key Responsibilities



Perform detailed credit, income, asset, collateral, and risk assessments

Underwrite Non-QM loan products including DSCR, Bank Statement, WVOE, and P&L loans

Ensure loan files comply with investor guidelines, federal regulations, and internal credit standards

Review AUS findings and apply appropriate conditions, overlays, and exceptions

Issue underwriting decisions: Approve, Deny, or Suspend with Conditions

Collaborate with processors, loan officers, and operations staff to clear conditions efficiently

Maintain excellent turn times while ensuring compliance and accuracy

Support training and guidance for junior underwriters when needed

Participate in credit reviews, audits, and updates to underwriting guidelines



Required Qualifications



5+ years of recent U.S. mortgage underwriting experience (REQUIRED)

Non-QM underwriting experience REQUIRED (DSCR, Bank Statement, WVOE, P&L)

Strong experience analyzing self-employed borrower income and complex financial scenarios

Strong knowledge of U.S. mortgage regulations (TRID, ATR/QM, Fair Lending, etc.)

Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail

Ability to make independent underwriting decisions with minimal supervision

Comfortable working in a fully remote environment with strict loan-level security protocols

Experience with Encompass is a plus



Preferred Second Language



Korean

Chinese

Vietnamese



Work Setup



Location: Remote

Schedule: 11:30 pm to 8:30 am PH time



Compensation: Competitive salary based on experience and qualifications.



Minimum Technical Requirements (IMPORTANT)



Applicants must meet the following minimum requirements:



1. Computer Requirements



At least 8GB RAM

Intel Core i5 4th Generation or newer (or equivalent AMD processor)

Reliable computer capable of handling mortgage systems and multiple documents



2. Internet Requirements



Stable internet connection

Minimum 100 Mbps download speed



Applicants must run a speed test at:







Please take a screenshot of your Speedtest result.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)



1. All applicants are required to
 their application to BOTH
 addresses below:











2. Use this exact subject line format:



UW-NONQM-2026 | Full Name | Years of UW Experience



Example:



UW-NONQM-2026 | Juan Dela Cruz | 8 Years



3. Your
 Must Include ALL of the Following



a. Resume link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or OnlineJobs link)

Resume must be set to “Anyone with the link can view”

c. Computer specifications

RAM

Processor / CPU model



d. Brief summary of your Non-QM underwriting experience

What are the three main documents you review when underwriting a DSCR loan?

To confirm that you carefully read the job post, please include this line at the very beginning of your
 message:

Applications that fail to follow ALL instructions will be automatically rejected.

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
Hello,



I run a Google Ads agency focused on home service businesses, mainly dumpster rental, junk removal, and demolition companies. These are local lead generation campaigns.



I’m looking for a Google Ads specialist with fluent English who is experienced in setting up, managing, and optimizing Google Ads campaigns at a high level.



This role is for someone who is:



- highly organized

- meticulous with details

- strong in written English

- proactive and open to learning

- hungry to grow with a small but growing agency



Please only apply if you are already confident managing Google Ads accounts on your own.



What you’ll be doing:



- managing an initial portfolio of 5 accounts

- optimizing campaigns weekly

- reviewing search terms and adding negatives

- looking for ways to reduce CPL and improve lead quality

- identifying opportunities to improve conversion rate

- monitoring performance and making clear, logical optimizations

- working with landing pages in Unbounce

- reviewing call recordings and lead quality through CallRail



These are mostly small, stable local accounts, but I need someone who is sharp, consistent, and detail-oriented. The goal is for the right person to grow into managing 15–20 accounts over time.



To apply, answer the following:



- Why do you believe you are a strong fit for this role?

- How do you usually optimize a Google Ads campaign for a local lead generation business?

- How many Google Ads accounts are you currently managing?

- What campaign types do you have the most experience with?

- Have you worked with landing pages and call tracking before? If yes, which tools?

- Please write “Meticulous” at the top of your application so I know you read the full post.

- I’m looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and genuinely good at Google Ads.

- Tell me your hourly rate (open to a monthly retainer down the road).



Applications with vague answers, poor grammar, or generic AI-style responses will not be considered.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

Adam

title: Experienced Female Virtual Assistant for U.S. Cleaning Company (GoHighLevel & BookingKoala Required) – Full-Time M–F
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based residential and short-term rental cleaning company seeking a highly reliable and experienced female Virtual Assistant to support daily operations and administrative work. This is a long-term position intended for someone looking for stability and consistent work for years, not a short-term role.



The core schedule is Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time. Additional hours outside of these times may also be available for applicants who are open to working more.



Responsibilities include answering inbound phone calls, booking jobs in BookingKoala, managing contacts and workflows in GoHighLevel, sending marketing texts and
s, completing administrative tasks, and maintaining accurate data in Google Sheets. You will communicate directly with customers, so professionalism and clear communication are essential.

Our company already has extensive systems, workflows, and structure in place. You must be comfortable learning existing processes quickly, following established systems, and adapting to the way the business operates. Accuracy, consistency, and attention to detail are non-negotiable.



Requirements:

Female applicant.

Previous experience supporting a cleaning or home service company.

Strong experience using BookingKoala and GoHighLevel.

Excellent spoken and written English.

Comfortable speaking with U.S.-based customers on the phone.

Highly organized, tech-savvy, and dependable.

Able to follow structured systems without constant supervision.



This role is not entry-level. We are looking for someone who can step in, learn our systems quickly, and handle operational and administrative responsibilities with minimal oversight.



If you meet all of the requirements above and are looking for a serious long-term role with a growing company, we would like to hear from you.

title: Quality Control Photo Editor (Remote) — Real Estate Photo Editing
description:
*100% REMOTE OPPORTUNITY! NEVER WALK TO WORK AGAIN!*

Work from the comfort of your own home!

Apply and come see why every employee we’ve hired never wants to leave us



If you want a steady role where your attention to detail actually matters, Dream Home Shots is hiring a Quality Control Photo Editor to be the final set of eyes on our AI-edited photos before they go to clients.



Schedule (must match exactly)

------------------------------------------- 

Monday – Saturday, 7:30 PM–11:30 PM EST

(Tuesday – Sunday, 8:30 AM–12:30 PM PHT)

* - Must be available for this exact schedule.

Hours may likely move to a full-time position.



About the Role:

----------------------

We’re a busy real estate media company switching to AI editing. We’re looking for someone with a reliable, time-efficient work ethic who is very detail-oriented and has strong English reading/writing skills.

Your job will be to quality control all photo edits we run through our AI editing software and make corrections when needed.



In this role you will:

- Review all photos to catch common mistakes by the editing software

- Complete photographer notes (item removals, minor fixes)

- Correct color/lens issues in Photoshop/Lightroom

- Upload the final images to our photo delivery platform



Required skills:

---------------------

- Strong Photoshop + Lightroom skills

- Ability to perform Color correction & identify wall color accuracy

- Lens corrections/distortion awareness

- Basic item removal

- Detail-oriented

- Able to be efficient without lowering quality expectations

- Strong English Abilities (Active communication, strong listening skills, and good English comprehension)

- HDR hand blending

- Virtual twilights/staging knowledge

- Experience with real estate photo editing



Daily workflow:

----------------------

- 7:30 PM: Pull completed AI photo edits

- Quality control against photographer notes and raw exposures

- Fix color/lighting consistency, lens corrections, AI artifacts

- Basic item removal in Photoshop

- Upload to the delivery platform

- End-of-shift handoff message for the AM team if anything is pending



How to Apply:

---------------------

If you are detail-oriented, professional, and excited to support a growing company, we’d love to hear from you! ????



Please provide EVERYTHING we ask for to be considered.

Send an
 to 
 with the subject:

“Application - Quality Control Photo Editor”



Include:

------------

- Your portfolio (before and after examples preferred)

- Your updated resume

- A short voice or video recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your editing experience

- Internet speed and computer specs

- A picture of a pink duck





Important:

----------------

- Do not apply if you are not okay with the hours of operation.

- If you do not send a portfolio, your application will not be reviewed.



Keywords: project coordinator, virtual assistant, real estate media, media delivery, photo editor, client success, quality control, workflow management, remote job, Matterport, Lightroom, Photoshop, English Proficiency

title: ----> Now Hiring: Senior Content Writer | Full-Time Role with 20+ Competitive Benefits
description:
As a Senior Content Writer, you will be instrumental in shaping our digital presence and refining our communication strategies. You will be responsible for creating compelling, accurate, and impactful content that helps injured victims understand their legal rights and options. This role requires a creative thinker who can turn complex ideas into clear, reader-accessible content.



Interested applicants may send their CV at 



Key Responsibilities

-Develop and produce high-quality content for landing pages, blogs, news articles, and other web-based formats.

-Conduct thorough research to ensure the accuracy and relevance of content.

-Edit and proofread content to maintain high grammar, punctuation, and style standards.

-Ensure all content reflects the firm's voice, tone, and brand guidelines.

-Apply SEO best practices to boost content visibility and search engine rankings.

-Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure content meets the firm’s objectives and audience needs.



Qualifications And Skills

-Minimum of 2 years of experience in content writing, preferably in the legal, healthcare, or real estate industries

-Exceptional writing and editing skills, with a keen attention to detail

-Passion for creating content that resonates with our audience

-Strong portfolio of published works demonstrating writing and editing capabilities

-Proven capability to break down complex information into clear, concise, and engaging content

-Ability to adapt writing style to suit different purposes

-Excellent verbal and written communication skills

-Ability to collaborate effectively with tea
mbers

-Demonstrated ability to work independently, manage time effectively, and thrive under tight deadlines in a dynamic environment

-Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace



Basic Requirements

Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection in case of outages



Work Details

Working Hours: Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time

Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

Stable employment

Competitive salary

title: Influencer Outreach & Brand Partnerships Manager
description:
We are looking for a motivated Creator Partnerships Manager to help grow brand partnerships and UGC opportunities for an established content creator with 400K+ followers across social platforms in the automotive niche.



Our content focuses on automotive culture, car reviews, creator education, and high-quality video production.



Your primary responsibility will be brand outreach and deal sourcing, securing both UGC content opportunities and high-quality automotive brand partnerships.



This role is ideal for someone experienced in influencer marketing, brand outreach, and partnership negotiation who is hungry to close deals and grow with a creator brand.



Primary Responsibilities



• Identify brands that are looking for UGC creators or influencer partnerships

• Send daily outreach
s to brands and marketing agencies

• Pitch partnership opportunities to automotive companies and lifestyle brands

• Secure UGC deals ranging from $500–$3,000+ per video

• Pitch long-term automotive brand deals that can reach four-figure to five-figure partnerships

• Track all outreach, responses, negotiations, and deals in a spreadsheet or CRM

• Follow up consistently with brands and agencies

• Communicate clearly with the creator regarding opportunities and deal progress



Partnership Categories



This role will focus on securing two types of opportunities:



1. UGC Content Deals



These are content creation projects where the creator produces high-quality video content for brands to use in advertisements or marketing campaigns.



These deals do NOT require posting on the creator’s social media pages.



Examples of brands to target:



• Lifestyle brands

• Fashion brands

• Technology products

• Mobile apps and software

• Fitness and wellness brands

• Consumer products

• Food and beverage brands

• Travel brands

• Men's grooming brands



The goal is to secure multiple UGC deals per month, typically ranging from $900–$2,500+ per video.



2. Automotive Brand Partnerships



These deals involve collaborations that will be posted on the creator’s social media platforms.



These partnerships must be high-quality automotive brands.



Examples include:



• Car detailing brands

• Automotive accessories

• Dash cam companies

• Car technology companies

• Tire brands

• Performance parts companies

• Automotive lifestyle brands



These partnerships should aim for larger campaigns or long-term collaborations, often reaching four-figure to five-figure deals.



Requirements



• Strong
 outreach experience

• Understanding of influencer marketing and UGC campaigns

• Experience pitching creators or brands preferred

• Excellent negotiation skills

• Highly fluent in written and spoken English

• Strong organization and follow-up skills

• Ability to send 20–50 outreach messages per day

• Ability to track partnerships and follow-ups consistently



Compensation



• $150 per month base salary

• 10% commission on every brand deal or UGC deal closed



Example:



If you close a $2,000 UGC deal, you earn $200 commission.



This role has high income potential for someone who is consistent at finding and closing deals.



Ideal Candidate



• Experienced in influencer outreach or partnership management

• Interested in automotive, social media, or creator businesses

• Self-motivated and results-driven

• Organized and comfortable managing outreach pipelines

• Strong communicator who can confidently negotiate with brands



How to Apply



Please include the following:



To confirm you read this post, start your application with the word DRIVE.



1) Examples of brand outreach or influencer marketing work you’ve done



2) A short explanation of how you would find and pitch UGC deals



3) One example of an
 pitch you would send to a brand



We are looking for someone who is proactive, organized, and serious about building long-term creator partnerships.

title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)



This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.



This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify fast, overcome objections, and close.



We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs (CompTIA, PMP, and related tracks). We provide warm leads. You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)



Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students



Run structured, consultative enrollment calls (needs analysis ? recommendation ? close)



Control the call, set next steps, and ask for the enrollment



Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency



Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies



Log activity and outcomes accurately in CRM



Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals



Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews



If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.



Who This Role Is For



Proven outbound / inside sales closers



Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone



Strong command of English with clear U.S. cultural fluency



Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions



Competitive, coachable, metrics-driven



Organized and accountable without supervision



Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus



Familiarity with certifications (CompTIA, PMP) helps—but closing ability matters more



Bachelor’s degree required



Who Should NOT Apply



Anyone who needs inbound-only leads



Anyone uncomfortable asking for money



Anyone who avoids objection handling



Anyone who wants a “soft” admissions role



Anyone who disappears when targets tighten



Schedule



Monday–Friday



10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST



Compensation



Base pay: $1,200–$1,600 USD per month



Performance-based advancement and leadership path



Long-term role with stability and growth for performers



(Top performers move fast. Average performers don’t last.)



What You Get



Warm leads with real intent



Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching



No gimmicks, no fake promises—just real programs that work



A sales culture that rewards results



Bottom Line



If you can:



Control a sales conversation



Build urgency without lying



Close consistently



Take coaching and improve



You will win here.



If not—this role will expose you quickly.
