title: Operations Coordinator
description:
About LineGear

LineGear supplies PPE, uniforms, and equipment to fire departments and wildland firefighters across California. Our customers include municipal fire departments, state agencies, and individual firefighters.

LineGear serves government fire agencies and operates in a compliance-sensitive procurement environment where accuracy in PO documentation and vendor records is critical.

This role is best suited for candidates who enjoy operations, organization, and managing order workflows.



Role Overview

The Operations Coordinator owns the operational workflow of orders and vendor purchasing, ensuring orders move efficiently through Quote  ?  Sales Order  ?  Purchase Order

This role supports the sales team by ensuring orders are processed accurately, vendors are coordinated, and operational systems remain organized and audit-ready. The position is primarily internal operations and does not require phone support.



Key Responsibilities

Quote Preparation

Prepare draft quotes and sales orders inside QuickBooks Desktop. Tasks include:

  - Creating sales orders and verifying product SKUs

  - Checking inventory availability and applying standard pricing rules

  - Estimating vendor lead times

  - Quotes are reviewed and sent to customers by the sales team.



Sales Order Processing

Manage incoming customer orders and ensure they are processed correctly, with same-day entry as the target SLA. Responsibilities include:

  - Creating and updating sales orders

  - Verifying order quantities, details, and inventory availability

  - Identifying items requiring purchase orders



Uniform Order Processing

Monitor the inbox 
 include:

  - Reviewing incoming uniform orders and entering them into the uniform tracking spreadsheet

  - Verifying quantities, checking inventory availability

  - Creating purchase orders when items are not in stock

  - Tracking vendor shipments through to fulfillment



Purchase Order Management

Create and send purchase orders to vendors in accordance with the authority guidelines. 

Additional responsibilities include:

  - Reviewing sales orders for inventory shortages before issuing POs

  - Confirming vendor receipt of each PO

  - Recording expected ship dates and tracking numbers

  - Monitoring backorders and flagging delays

Purchase orders should generally be created only against confirmed sales orders, unless instructed otherwise by management.



Vendor Coordination

Communicate with vendors regarding order status and shipments. Vendor follow-up should occur within 3 business days of any open item. Tasks include:

  - Confirming PO receipt and requesting shipment updates

  - Recording tracking numbers and monitoring vendor lead times

  - Escalating vendor delays to the manager via Slack, Teams, or daily
 update



Vendor File & Data Management

Maintain accurate vendor information across company systems, including:

  - Vendor contact lists and pricing lists

  - Product catalogs and vendor lead time notes

Vendor information should be organized within QuickBooks vendor records, shared Google Drive folders, and internal pricing spreadsheets.



Order Status Research

Assist the internal team with order status inquiries. Tasks include:

  - Checking inventory availability and verifying vendor shipment status

  - Confirming expected delivery dates and providing internal updates to the team



Product & Pricing Data Maintenance

Maintain internal product data to support quoting and purchasing:

  - Updating vendor pricing, maintaining SKU data, organizing product information

  - Tracking vendor lead times and flagging changes



SOP Documentation

Create and maintain written standard operating procedures (SOPs) for all recurring tasks within this role. Responsibilities include:

  - Documenting step-by-step workflows for order entry, PO issuance, vendor follow-up, and uniform order processing

  - Updating SOPs when processes change

  - Maintaining SOPs in a shared Google Drive folder accessible to the manager

SOP documentation ensures operational continuity and is a standing expectation of the role, not a one-time task.



Tools Used

The Operations Coordinator will work primarily in:

  - QuickBooks Desktop (accessed via Remote Desktop — see required skills)

  - Google Sheets and Google Drive

  - Shared
 inboxes

  - Slack and/or Microsoft Teams



Work Schedule

Full-time position, 40 hours per week, aligned with U.S. Pacific Time business hours.



Location                        Hours

Philippines                    Approximately 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

California (PT)               Approximately 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM PT



Exact hours may vary slightly depending on operational needs.



Required Skills

  - QuickBooks Desktop experience — required. Candidates with QuickBooks Online experience only will need to demonstrate ability to learn QBD quickly. Access is provided via Remote Desktop; a stable, high-speed internet connection is required.

  - Strong written English

  - Excellent attention to detail

  - Strong spreadsheet skills (Excel or Google Sheets)

  - Ability to follow and document structured processes

  - Ability to manage multiple tasks and open orders simultaneously



Preferred Experience

Candidates with experience in the following areas are preferred:

  - Operations coordination, procurement, or purchasing

  - Logistics support or order management

  - Inventory tracking in a distribution or product-based business

  - B2B or government procurement environments



Compensation & Reporting

Starting compensation: $800/month

This role reports directly to Owner



Application Instructions

To confirm that you carefully read this job description, please include the word:

FIRELINE

in the first sentence of your application. Applications without this word may not be reviewed.



Send your application to 
 the following questions in your
 and attach a resume for review.

1. Why are you the perfect fit for this role? Please include any examples of your previous work or projects that demonstrate your expertise.

2. Considering the diverse responsibilities of this role, which parts are you most comfortable or excited with? Which parts will you still need to master?

3. Have you worked for foreign employers before? What specific days and hours have you worked in the past?

- Strategy-to-visual translation and performance-based iteration



You may also support organic social,
, website assets, and product launches depending on skillset.



We run a structured creative system. Clear briefs, fast execution, work goes live within days. Real creative autonomy—your ideas shape the brand.



What We're Looking For

Must-haves:

- Strong portfolio with static ads and landing pages that drive performance

- 3+ years as a Graphic Designer with D2C or e-commerce brands

- Command of layout, hierarchy, typography, and composition

- High ownership. Move fast without sacrificing quality.



Bonus points:

- Experience with US, UK, Australia, or Canada brands (fashion/beauty especially)

- Deep Meta ad expertise and creative testing knowledge

-
 or lifecycle marketing design experience

- Data-informed iteration approach



Why Join ARDANT

1. See your impact. Your designs reach a global audience, drive revenue, and you see results in real time.

2. Grow fast. Performance-driven culture. Deliver results, take on more ownership, advance quickly.

3. Learn from the best. Work with founders and senior leaders who've scaled brands from launch to eight figures and beyond.

4. Creative ownership. Real autonomy and direct input on creative direction.

5. Build something category-defining. We're merging design and innovation to create something new.

6. Flexibility. Fully remote with flexible hours.



How to Apply

Please provide your CV and portfolio of winning static ads.

title: Full-Time YouTube Video Editor (Longform) needed for Faceless Channels
description:
*About the Role*

Salary: $750/month + bonuses for videos that perform well

Hours: Full-time (40 hrs/week)

I run multiple faceless YouTube channels. I handle all the scripts and generate rough video drafts myself. I need someone to take those drafts, review them, and edit them into polished upload-ready videos.

Target output: 8 finished videos per day. - to clarify: the videos are already 80% done - you just need to polish them, fix mistakes, swap footage in some parts and make it more engaging.



*What You'll Do*



Receive rough video drafts fro
 daily

Review each video for quality issues (bad footage, awkward cuts, pacing problems)

Replace footage that doesn't fit, fix pacing, adjust cuts

Deliver upload-ready videos consistently every day



*What I'm Looking For*



Experience with video editing (Premiere, DaVinci, or similar)

Good understanding of YouTube retention and storytelling.

Ability to source footage for the videos

Detail-oriented — you catch when something looks off

Basic English (enough to understand the video content and communicate with me)

Able to follow SOPs without constant supervision

Reliable and consistent — 8 videos a day, every day

Responsive — I don't care when you work, but I need fast replies to messages during the week.

Start your application with the word "cat" so I know you read this

Fast learner, can adapt to different editing software than what you're used to



*Bonus (Not Required)*

Familiarity with YouTube or faceless content

Knows how to prompt AI and use AI for your daily workflow



*How to Apply*

Answer these:



What video editing software do you use?

What hours are you available to work daily?

Attach a portfolio of videos that you've edited (and channels you've worked for, if possible)



Qualified applicants will receive a short paid test task before being hired.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
> Company Description



Sofia Health is a technology platform that powers booking, payments, scheduling, and operational infrastructure for independent health and wellness professionals. Our work is systems-driven, detail-heavy, and requires precision across data, reporting, and written materials.



We’re hiring a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support internal operations, reporting, and editorial quality control—not just admin tasks.







> This Role Is a Strong Fit If You:

- Are meticulous with data, documents, and formatting

- Instinctively catch errors, inconsistencies, and missing details

- Can read critically and edit for clarity without changing intent

- Are comfortable switching between spreadsheets, reports, and written content

- Take pride in clean, accurate, professional output





** This is not a social media, inbox-only, or calendar-focused VA role.



> Core Responsibilities:



Data & Reporting

- Organize, clean, and maintain structured data in spreadsheets and internal systems

- Excel (formulas, filters, sorting, validation)

s, and internal materials

Operational Support

> Required Skills & Experience

- High attention to detail and formatting standards

title: AI Automation Engineer
description:
About role:



Sofia Health is a growing tech platform in the health & wellness space. We are looking for an experienced AI Automation Engineer who can build AI agents, develop automations, write scripts, and integrate APIs to improve our internal systems, workflows, and customer experience.



This is NOT a beginner role.



We are looking for someone who has real, hands-on experience building automations with AI + code, connecting platforms, and deploying systems that run reliably in production. You will work directly with the CEO and our engineering team to create internal AI tools, streamline processes, and build systems that remove manual work across the company.



* RESPONSIBILITIES:

You will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining AI-powered systems, including:



AI Agents & Workflows:

- Build, deploy, and maintain AI agents for internal operations (provider tagging, onboarding, support tools, content workflows, etc.)

- Train models and optimize prompts for reliability and accuracy

- Build autonomous or semi-autonomous agents that perform multi-step tasks



Automation & Integrations:

- Build automations using Python, JavaScript, 
, Zapier, or custom code

- Create integrations between Sofia Health and third-party platforms (Stripe, Google Calendar,
 systems, podcast tools, CRM, etc.)

- Develop custom API workflows and write scripts for repetitive tasks

- Troubleshoot broken integrations, rate limits, and edge cases



Engineering & System Support:

- Write clean, maintainable scripts for automation tasks

- Build internal dashboards and tools where needed

- Work with our engineering team to design system architectures for AI-driven workflows

- Document processes, logic, and technical flows clearly



Continuous Improvement:

- Identify opportunities to automate manual processes

- Proactively bring ideas for new AI tools or system improvements

- Help design scalable AI workflows as the company grows



* REQUIREMENTS: 

You must have REAL experience in the following:



Technical Skills (Required):

- Strong experience with AI tools & OpenAI API

- Ability to build multi-step AI agents

- Strong Python or JavaScript scripting skills

- Experience with REST APIs (auth, webhooks, tokens, rate limits)

- Experience with 
 or Zapier

- Building internal automations that run in production

- Experience integrating tools like Stripe, Google Calendar, CRMs, Notion,
 platforms, etc.

- Strong debugging and problem-solving skills



Soft Skills:

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Strong documentation habits

- Can manage entire projects independently

- Fast learner, proactive thinker

- Comfortable working with ambiguity and building systems from scratch

- Reliable, organized, and comfortable with fast-moving tasks



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have):

- Experience with Django or other web frameworks

- Experience with LangChain or similar frameworks

- Experience with workflow mapping

- Experience in marketplace or SaaS environments



* WHO THIS ROLE IS PERFECT FOR

Someone who:

 ? loves building automations

 ? enjoys solving complex operational problems with AI

 ? has experience deploying scripts or agents that run reliably

 ? wants stability and a long-term full-time role

 ? thrives in a fast-moving startup environment



* WORK ENVIRONMENT

Fully remote

Flexible schedule (with overlap in US morning hours preferred)

Long-term career growth potential

Work directly with leadership

Opportunity to shape AI systems for the entire company





* WHY WORK WITH US

At Sofia Health, you’ll help build AI systems that power a fast-growing platform reaching thousands of wellness professionals and clients. Your work will directly shape how we automate, scale, and innovate.

If you’re excited to build real AI systems that solve real problems, we want you on our team.

title: AU Bookkeeper
description:
About You

You’re someone who brings positive energy to your work and enjoys being part of a collaborative, purpose-driven team. You’re friendly, approachable, and people feel comfortable coming to you with questions.



You care about doing things properly, you’re happy to jump in, help out, and figure things out as you go. You enjoy ticking things off a list, improving how things work, and knowing your work genuinely helps others.



Details

Reports to: Management Accountant

Employment Status: Full-time, permanent employee

Working Hours: AU Standard business hours and additional time as required by the role



Role Purpose

The Finance Support Officer is responsible for the end-to-end delivery of core transactional finance processes, including accounts payable, bank reconciliations, corporate cards, payroll processing, and financial data administration. This role is critical to the smooth running of the finance function, ensuring accurate, timely, high-quality financial processing that supports strong reporting, compliance, and organizational decision-making.



Role Responsibilities

A. Accounts Payable:

Process all supplier invoices, employee & volunteer expense claims, ensuring correct coding, approvals, GST treatment, currency, and documentation.

Manage the AP inbox and triage queries.

Maintain accurate supplier records, including bank details and documentation checks.

Prepare AP batches in line with cut-off timelines and approval workflows.

Conduct first-pass AP review before Management Accountant review (accuracy, completeness, coding).

Reconcile AP accounts and investigate variances.



B. Accounts Receivable:

Prepare and send invoices to partners, funders, and internal stakeholders.

Maintain AR schedules and follow up on outstanding amounts.

Reconcile AR balances and ensure all receipts are allocated.



C. Corporate Credit Cards:

Manage card issuance, cancellations, limits, and user onboarding.

Review monthly card claims, ensuring receipts, coding, and notes are provided.

Follow up late claims and unresolved discrepancies.

Reconcile company card accounts and ensure accurate EOM processing.



D. Payroll:

Prepare and process fortnightly payroll in line with contracts, and organisational policies.

Maintain employee master data with Xero, ensuring accuracy of bank details, tax information, superannuation, and entitlements.

Process new starters, changes, terminations, and pay adjustments.

Reconcile payroll reports, checking for variance and anomalies.

Prepare workpapers for superannuation payments, payroll journals, and leave reconciliations.

Work with P&E to ensure payroll accuracy, and timely updates to employee records.



E. Bank Reconciliation:

Complete daily and monthly bank reconciliations across all accounts.

Investigate and resolve unreconciled transactions.

Ensure all receipts, payments, and transfers are accurately recorded.



F. End of Month Processes:

Draft prepayments, accruals, apportionments, and routine journals.

Prepare EOM workpapers to a standard ready for first review.

Ensure all transactional processing is complete before close deadlines.

Maintain high-quality data hygiene to support forecasting, reporting, and analysis.



G. Data Entry and Record Keeping:

Maintain accurate, organised financial files and documentation for audit readiness.

Ensure data entry is correct, complete, and aligned with financial policies and accounting standards.

Support system updates, automation improvements, and process changes.



H. General Administrative Support:

Provide customer-focused support to internal stakeholders on finance and payroll queries.

Assist the Finance Team during peak periods (audit, EOFY, EOM, etc).

Participate in continuous improvement projects.

Contribute to team discussions on process optimisation, automation, and better ways of working.



Key Skills and Experience

-Experience in a finance support, accounts, or payroll role.

-Solid understanding of accounts payable, accounts receivable, and payroll processes.

-Proficient with Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.

-Experience with accounting software (Xero preferred).

-Strong numeracy and data-entry accuracy.

-Understanding of basic accounting and payroll principles.

-High attention to detail and ability to deliver consistent accuracy.

-Excellent time management and ability to work to tight deadlines.

-Strong communication and customer service skills.

-Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks.

-Comfortable with change, learning, and improving processes.

-Ability to handle confidential information with integrity and discretion.

-Certificate, Diploma, or Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business, or related field

title: AI Content Creator & Video Editor
description:
Responsibilities

- Generate 10+ AI-generated videos daily with Nano Banana 2 and Google Veo 3.1

- Build JSON prompts (from ChatGPT/Claude) to create content in Google Flow

- Edit and finalize 2–5 short-form videos per day



Tools

- Google Flow: Nano Banana 2 -> Veo 3.1

- CapCut

- ChatGPT/Claude

- Elevenlabs

- Google Drive

- 



Experience

- 6+ months of experience with creating images with nano banana pro/2 

- 6+ months of experience with creating videos with veo 3.1 

- 1+ year of experience with video editing with CapCut



Skills

- Knows how to create consistent images/videos on nano banana 2 & veo 3.1 with json prompts from AI models.

- Willing to adapt: This content space is adapting and changes almost daily. You have the ability to adapt and understand new trends and concepts quickly.

- Creative mind: You understand what it takes to make viral content. You understand the viral principles and rules of short-form content.

- Hard Working

- Communicative



Pay

The monthly salary range for this role is $400 - $500. Monthly wage may vary depending on skills, experience, and performance. If you perform well, you can get bonuses of up to 10% in that month. If you perform really really well, then I'll give you a higher monthly pay.

title: Paralegal
description:
We are a boutique law firm that advises businesses operating on matters pertaining to licensing and compliance. Our team is currently looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented paralegal to support our practice. The selected candidate must be able to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours.



About the Position



The paralegal will work closely with the firm’s lead attorney, providing administrative, organizational, and client-support assistance in a dynamic legal practice. This position requires excellent attention to detail, strong written communication skills, and the ability to handle multiple tasks efficiently while maintaining professionalism and confidentiality.



Core Responsibilities



- Draft, format, and proofread legal correspondence and client communications

- Assist with preparation and review of legal documents, filings, and submissions

- Conduct legal research

- Maintain and organize digital client files and internal tracking systems

- Communicate with current and prospective clients in a professional manner

- Prepare and distribute engagement letters

- Track deadlines and manage internal calendars for filings and client matters

- Proofread blog posts and other written materials (and, within time, assist with drafting posts)

- Prepare PowerPoint presentations

- Assist with client intake, respond to inquiries, and eventually conduct introductory calls with prospective clients



Qualifications



- Minimum of one year of experience as a paralegal or in legal assistant role within a professional services setting

- A paralegal certificate or formal legal training is strongly preferred

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills

- Strong organizational abilities with meticulous attention to detail

- Ability to work independently and manage deadlines effectively

- Comfortable working within structured and highly regulated environments

- Strong technical proficiency and comfort working remotely with digital collaboration tools



Work Requirements



- Availability during U.S. Eastern Time business hours

- Familiarity with Google Drive and related tools



Application Instructions



(Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.)



To apply, please:



- Provide at least five bullet points explaining why you are well suited for this role

- Submit your resume

- Include a short written summary describing what you are seeking in your next position

- Provide a 2–3 minute video introduction sharing your background and why you are interested in this opportunity

- Include the word “Plant” in the subject line  of your application 

- Use at least 5 apply points



We will not consider applicants who do not provide all of the above.

title: Project based Web Designer (No Code and Low Code CMS Specialist)
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail oriented Web Designer with 3+ years of experience designing and building modern websites using no code and low code CMS platforms such as Wix, Squarespace, Shopify, and WordPress with Elementor.



This role focuses on creating visually compelling, responsive, and high performing websites with strong UX and UI execution. You will work on business websites, landing pages, and e commerce experiences, translating design ideas into clean, functional digital experiences with minimal custom code.



Role Overview



Project based contract role. Work will be assigned per project depending on client needs and internal project allocation.



Project based contract with an hourly rate starting at $7 per hour, with adjustments based on experience, role fit, and application performance, up to $8 per hour.



Key Responsibilities



Design and build responsive websites using Wix, Squarespace, Shopify, and WordPress with Elementor



Customize CMS templates using native tools, drag and drop builders, and light HTML or CSS adjustments



Translate wireframes and mockups from Figma into fully realized website designs



Create user centered layouts optimized for performance, accessibility, and mobile responsiveness



Develop e commerce experiences including product pages, collections, and checkout flows using Shopify and WooCommerce



Maintain consistency with brand guidelines, UI standards, and visual hierarchy



Optimize websites for SEO, site speed, and cross browser compatibility



Collaborate with internal teams or clients to define design requirements and deliver projects



Provide post launch refinements and CMS guidance when needed



Tools and Platforms



Wix Editor and Wix Studio

Squarespace Fluid Engine

Shopify Theme Editor

WordPress with Elementor

Figma

Adobe Creative Suite including Photoshop, Illustrator, and After Effects

Basic HTML and CSS for design enhancements



Qualifications



3+ years of web design experience using no code or low code CMS platforms



Strong portfolio demonstrating modern, responsive web design



Solid understanding of UX and UI principles, visual hierarchy, and responsive design



Experience designing e commerce websites using Shopify or WooCommerce



Comfortable working with CMS tools and performing light HTML or CSS adjustments



Strong attention to detail, communication skills, and ability to manage multiple projects



Nice to Have



Experience implementing branding systems across websites

Familiarity with Google Analytics, heatmap tools, and A B testing

Understanding of WCAG accessibility standards

Experience with motion graphics or web animations using After Effects or Lottie

Ability to recommend CMS platforms based on project needs



Why Join Us



Work on a variety of website projects across industries while building strong CMS and UX expertise. This role offers clear expectations, ownership of design work, and opportunities to grow in web design and digital experience execution.



Important Application Requirements



To be considered for this role, complete and accurate application materials are required.



• A properly completed Web Designer Application Overview document

• Portfolio samples that demonstrate relevant web design and CMS experience



Applications that are incomplete, missing required documents, or do not demonstrate relevant experience will not move forward in the review process.



Apply here:





Please ensure the Web Designer Application Overview is downloaded and fully completed before submitting your application.

title: Customer Service Representative / Dispatcher (Home Services – Electrical)
description:
Customer Service Representative / Dispatcher (Home Services – Electrical)



Company: Mister Sparky Electric

Position: Customer Service Representative / Dispatcher

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-Time

Schedule: US Business Hours (Eastern Time)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses



Join Our Team as a Customer Service Representative with Dispatching Experience



Mister Sparky is a professional residential electrical service company serving homeowners. We pride ourselves on fast service, professional technicians, and exceptional customer care.



We are looking for a reliable, proactive, and organized Virtual Assistant to serve as our Customer Service Representative (CSR) and Dispatcher.



This role is critical to the success of our daily operations. You will be the first point of contact for homeowners calling for electrical services and the central coordinator for dispatching technicians to jobs.



If you enjoy helping customers, solving problems, and managing schedules in a fast-paced environment, this role may be perfect for you.



Key Responsibilities



Customer Service



Answer incoming phone calls from homeowners needing electrical service

- Respond to customer inquiries via phone,
, and text

- Provide friendly, professional communication with every customer

- Book service appointments and enter job details accurately into scheduling software

- Confirm appointments and provide arrival time updates to customers



Dispatching



- Dispatch electricians based on location, skillset, and job priority

- Monitor technician routes and adjust schedules to maximize efficiency

- Maintain clear communication with field technicians throughout the day

- Ensure technicians arrive on time and jobs stay on schedule

- Assist technicians with job information, customer details, and updates



Customer Experience



- Follow up with customers after service appointments

- Ensure customer satisfaction and gather feedback

- Help resolve customer concerns professionally

- Escalate service issues to management when necessary



Administrative Support



- Maintain accurate customer records in the CRM

- Update job notes and service tickets

- Confirm job completion

- Assist with collecting payments and invoicing when required

- Help maintain an organized dispatch board and technician schedule



Required Qualifications



- Minimum 2 years experience as a CSR or dispatcher

- Experience working with home service companies (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, appliance repair, etc.) is strongly preferred

- Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Experience with dispatching or CRM software such as:

- ServiceTitan

- Housecall Pro

- Jobber

- FieldEdge

- Service Fusion

- or similar

- Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks efficiently

- Strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

- Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

- Strong computer skills and ability to learn new software quickly



Preferred Skills



- Experience working with U.S. home service companies

- Familiarity with dispatch boards and route optimization

- Understanding of basic residential electrical services

- Experience with sales or upselling service upgrades

- Bilingual (English/Spanish) is a plus but not required

- Experience with Google Workspace, Slack, or CRM systems



Equipment Requirements



- Reliable high-speed internet connection

- Quiet workspace suitable for taking calls

- Computer with minimum 8GB RAM

- Noise-canceling headset

- Backup internet or power is a plus



Work Schedule



- Full-Time

- Monday – Friday

- US Eastern Time Business Hours

- Occasional weekend coverage may be requested



Compensation



- Competitive salary based on experience

- Performance bonuses

- Long-term position with opportunity for growth



We value loyal, dependable tea
mbers and are looking for someone who wants to grow with our company.



Why Work With Us



- Stable long-term position

- Friendly and professional team

- Clear systems and processes

- Opportunity to grow with a rapidly expanding company

- Supportive leadership that values remote tea
mbers



How to Apply



To apply, please include the following:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your previous experience with dispatching or customer service

3. The dispatch or CRM software you have used

4. Your internet speed test results

5. A short voice recording introducing yourself (1–2 minutes)



Important:



Please include the phrase “Power On Dispatcher” at the top of your application so we know you read this entire job posting.



Applications without this phrase may not be considered.

Additional Screening Questions



Please answer these in your application:



1. What dispatching or scheduling software have you used before?

2. Have you worked with a U.S. home services company? If yes, which industry?

3. How many technicians have you dispatched at the same time?

4. How do you handle an angry customer?

5. What would you do if two technicians are late for their next appointments?



Ideal Candidate Traits



The ideal candidate is:



- Organized

- Calm under pressure

- Friendly and customer-focused

- Detail oriented

- Reliable

- Tech savvy

- Able to think quickly and solve problems



About Mister Sparky



Mister Sparky is a trusted residential electrical service company focused on delivering safe, reliable, and professional electrical services to homeowners.



Our mission is simple:



Provide exceptional service and treat every customer like family.
